1000654198.english: Really... I know nothing at all.

1000654200.english: I can't do this... There's no sign of it getting any better at all...
1000654200.korean: 안 되겠어... 도무지 나아질 기미가 보이질 않아...

1000654201.english: What should I do...? If you tell the truth now...

1000654202.english: Then all the preparations I've made so far will be in vain...
1000654202.korean: 그러면 지금까지 준비한 게 모두 헛수고가 될 텐데...

1000654203.english: What do I do...? Why did you do that, Undine? You idiot...

1000654207.english: City, Sia, I was so surprised... What's wrong?
1000654207.korean: 시, 시아 깜짝 놀랐어... 왜 그래?

1000654208.english: Yes, that's what I was going to say. How long have you been there?
1000654208.korean: 내, 내가 할 소리야. 언제부터 거기 있었어?

1000654211.english: Just cheesecake, cheese tart, and cheese bacon bake...
1000654211.korean: 그냥 치즈 케이크랑, 치즈 타르트랑, 치즈 베이컨 구이...

1000654212.english: Cheese cookies, cheese shaved ice, cheese toast...
1000654212.korean: 치즈 쿠키, 치즈 빙수, 치즈 토스트...

1000654214.english: Why is it strange? Everything looks absolutely delicious...

1000654215.english: ...... You can only make things related to cheese, right?

1000654216.english: I tried doing other things too, but... It's not working well. I'm just about to give up.
1000654216.korean: 다른 것도 해보려고 해봤는데... 잘 안 되네. 그냥 포기할까봐.

1000654219.english: My sister said so. They say there's nothing you can't do in the world.
1000654219.korean: 언니가 그랬어. 세상에 안 되는 일은 없대.

1000654220.english: If they say no, it's no. They said it's not easy.
1000654220.korean: 안 된다고 하면 안 돼. 쉽지 않다고 하래.

1000654221.english: And they told me to smile. Like this...

1000654226.english: Yeah. That's amazing. I feel like it's really giving me energy.
1000654226.korean: 응. 신기하네. 정말 힘이 나는 것 같아.

1000654227.english: Sia, did that help? That's a relief.

1000654228.english: But this... Who are you eating with? Sia, can I eat it?
1000654228.korean: 그런데 이거... 누구랑 먹어? 시아, 먹어도 돼?

1000654229.english: I ate this much this morning, and I'm still hungry...

1000654230.english: Hoo hoo. You can eat as much as you want. No, eat it all.
1000654230.korean: 후후. 먹고 싶은 만큼 먹어도 돼. 아니, 다 먹어.

1000654233.english: Wow, it's delicious...! Sia, I've never eaten anything this delicious before!
1000654233.korean: 와아, 맛있어...! 시아, 이렇게 맛있는 거 처음 먹어봐!

1000654235.english: Yeah. Chef. They say he's not as high-ranking as the squadron commander, but he's an incredibly impressive person. It's like that.
1000654235.korean: 응. 주방장님. 전단장님보다는 낮은데, 엄~청 대단한 사람이래. 그거 같아.

1000654236.english: Of course~! I am Undine, the genius pastry chef in charge of the kitchen at Cafe Horizon!
1000654236.korean: 당연하지~! 내가 바로 카페 호라이즌의 주방을 책임지는, 천재 파티시에르 운디네니까!

1000654237.english: If you want more, I'll make more. Don't hesitate to speak!
1000654237.korean: 더 먹고 싶으면 더 만들어줄게. 부담 없이 말해!

1000654242.english: It's been behind my back since earlier... Can you feel it?

1000654243.english: ... So it wasn't just me, huh?

1000654244.english: Then, let's... Should we go catch them?

1000654245.english: One, two, three! If you do it, you'll get caught. Got it?
1000654245.korean: 하나, 둘, 셋! 하면 잡아오는 거야. 알겠지?

1000654249.english: Ahahaha! Go away, it's itchy! ~ Sia, my stomach hurts~
1000654249.korean: 아하하하하! 가, 간지러워!~ 시아, 배 아파~

1000654251.english: What's this guy up to, coming here?
1000654251.korean: 이 녀석, 여기는 무슨 속셈으로 왔지?

1000654252.english: City, Sia... I was just passing by... Aaaah!

1000654253.english: I can't do it. He's got a very tight mouth.
1000654253.korean: 안 되겠어. 입이 아주 무거운 녀석인 걸.

1000654254.english: Pani Pani, I think that's all there is here.
1000654254.korean: 파니파니, 여기선 그거밖에 없을 것 같아.

1000654255.english: Ah, the carrot and the stick, right?

1000654259.english: Wow, it's delicious! Sia, I've never eaten anything like this before. What's going on?
1000654259.korean: 마, 맛있어~ 시아, 이런 건 처음 먹어봐. 뭐야뭐야?

1000654260.english: It's a stir-fry Hunter made. Isn't it delicious?

1000654263.english: Munching... Yeah, I was just passing by and the delicious smell caught my attention!
1000654263.korean: 우물우물... 웅, 지나가다 맛있는 냄새가 나서!

1000654264.english: I just ate, but I'm hungry again, so... Wow, that's delicious!
1000654264.korean: 밥 먹었는데 또 배고파져서 잠깐... 와아~ 맛있어!

1000654266.english: Eat a lot. You need to eat a lot so your bones will be strong and you'll grow tall.
1000654266.korean: 많이 먹어. 많이 먹어야 뼈도 튼튼해지고, 키도 쑥쑥 크지.

1000654267.english: Huh? Isn't Pani Pani shorter than Sia?
1000654267.korean: 어? 파니파니가 시아보다 키 작지 않아?

1000654268.english: You shouldn't compare yourself to me. The person you need to surpass is yourself!
1000654268.korean: 날 기준으로 삼으면 안 되지~ 뛰어넘어야 하는 것은 바로, 자기자신!

1000654269.english: Wow... Yes! Sia, I'm going to beat Sia!

1000654270.english: Okay, okay. Okay, eat as much as you want.

1000654271.english: Why is it so noisy? Has Emily returned?

1000654272.english: Ah, it's Miss Salacia. Nice to meet you.

1000654275.english: It's a dish I made, but... When did you hand them out?
1000654275.korean: 제가 만든 요리긴 한데... 언제 나눠주셨죠?

1000654277.english: They said they came because they smelled something delicious. It was so cute, I gave some away.
1000654277.korean: 맛있는 냄새가 나서 찾아왔대. 귀여워서 좀 나눠줬어.

1000654278.english: It's food we eat among ourselves, so it's a bit... not suitable to serve to others.
1000654278.korean: 저희끼리 먹는 음식이라 다른 분에게 대접하기엔 조금...

1000654281.english: I'm glad you're enjoying it. You can have as much more as you like.
1000654281.korean: 맛있게 먹어주시니 기쁘네요. 얼마든지 더 드셔도 괜찮습니다.

1000654282.english: Oh, just a moment... You have sauce on your mouth.

1000654284.english: Hehe. Hunter, you're like my sister.

1000654285.english: Ah, hunters definitely have that side to them.
1000654285.korean: 아~ 확실히 헌터가 그런 면이 있지.

1000654286.english: When you take care of Emily, you feel like a guardian, right?
1000654286.korean: 에밀리 돌볼 때도 보호자 같은 느낌이지?

1000654287.english: But they're only strict with us~

1000654288.english: That's right, that's right! Be nice to us too, Hunter!
1000654288.korean: 옳소, 옳소! 우리한테도 자상하게 대해줘, 헌터!

1000654289.english: We're being so nice, aren't we?

1000654290.english: Put some saliva on it first.

1000654291.english: It's because Emily is copying the behavior of her two older sisters. Last time, I...
1000654291.korean: 에밀리가 언니인 둘의 행동을 따라하니까 그렇다고, 저번에 제가...

1000654292.english: No, no! Then I won't be your older sister!
1000654292.korean: 싫어, 싫어! 그럼 나 언니 안 해!

1000654293.english: Then we'll be the younger siblings~!

1000654295.english: Let's give you some age-appropriate guidance.

1000654297.english: Ouch, that hurts... Hunter, you punched me so hard without controlling your strength...
1000654297.korean: 으윽, 아파라... 헌터, 힘조절도 안 하고 꿀밤 때렸어...

1000654298.english: Ouch... I knew I'd get in trouble, but I couldn't resist because I thought their reaction would be funny.
1000654298.korean: 아야야... 혼날거라고 생각은 했는데, 반응이 재밌을 것 같아서 못 참았네.

1000654299.english: Oh, Sia. This is just a joke between us, so you don't need to worry about it.
1000654299.korean: 아, 시아. 이거 우리끼리 장난치는 거니까 걱정 안해도 돼~

1000654300.english: Yes! Because they all looked like they were having fun. Like family.

1000654301.english: ... Oh. Sia misses her sister too.

1000654303.english: Even if we're apart for just a little while, I want to see you again, and... well...
1000654303.korean: 조금이라도 떨어져있으면 다시 또 보고 싶고, 뭐...

1000654304.english: I suddenly thought of Emily too. They said they were going out to play with their friends earlier, I wonder where they are now...
1000654304.korean: 나도 갑자기 에밀리 생각 나네. 아까 친구들이랑 놀러 나간다더니, 지금 어디있으려나...

1000654305.english: Ahaha. Sia, you've got something on your mouth again already.
1000654305.korean: 아하하. 시아, 그새 입에 또 뭐 묻혔다.

1000654307.english: Yes, I'll wipe it for you. Good boy/girl!

1000654310.english: Oh, after you finish eating, do you want to go out and play with us? Hunters too.
1000654310.korean: 아, 밥 다 먹고 나서 우리랑 같이 놀러갈래? 헌터도 같이.

1000654311.english: Clothes. Then let's go play volleyball! We'll show you how to do it.
1000654311.korean: 옷. 그럼 배구하러 가자! 어떻게 하는지 우리가 알려줄게.

1000654313.english: Sia, she loves playing the most. Let's play together!
1000654313.korean: 시아, 노는 거 제일 좋아. 같이 놀래!

1000654314.english: Oh... Now that I've started a fire, I feel a bit better...
1000654314.korean: 아... 불 피우니까 좀 살 것 같네...

1000654316.english: I brought a generous amount of delicious food.

1000654319.english: I'm craving something with warm broth, but... ugh.
1000654319.korean: 따뜻한 국물 음식이 먹고 싶은데, 후우...

1000654321.english: Even these small details need to be done realistically.

1000654322.english: Well said, Io. You have to train like you fight.
1000654322.korean: 말 잘 했다, 이오. 훈련도 실전처럼 해야지.

1000654323.english: Our next destination, Northern Europe, will be less cold than here, so getting used to the weather now will be helpful. Let's just hang in there a little longer.
1000654323.korean: 이 다음 행선지인 북유럽은 여기보다 덜 추우니까, 여기서 미리 적응하면 도움될 거다. 조금만 고생하자.

1000654326.english: Oh! That's him. Belonging to that mermaid.
1000654326.korean: 아! 쟤 걔다. 그 머메이드 소속.

1000654327.english: What's going on here? Oh, are you perhaps the informant?!
1000654327.korean: 여긴 무슨 일이야? 아, 혹시 제보자인가?!

1000654328.english: ... I wonder if they're trying to cover that up.

1000654329.english: The tree is so thin that it doesn't provide any cover at all...

1000654331.english: Yeah. Sia, hide behind the tree. You mustn't get caught.
1000654331.korean: 응. 시아, 나무 뒤에 숨어있어. 들키면 안 돼.

1000654332.english: I told you not to disturb them because they're training.
1000654332.korean: 훈련 중이니까 방해하면 안 된다고 그랬어.

1000654334.english: If that's the case, it's okay. Because I was taking a break to eat.
1000654334.korean: 그런 거라면 괜찮아. 식사하려고 쉬는 중이었으니까.

1000654335.english: It's cold, come here. Warm up by the fire.
1000654335.korean: 추운데 이리 와. 불도 좀 쬐고.

1000654336.english: ... Are you sure I can go? My sister said I shouldn't bother other people...
1000654336.korean: ...진짜 가도 돼? 언니가 다른 분들한테 폐 끼치면 안된댔는데...

1000654337.english: Our boss never goes back on his word.
1000654337.korean: 우리 대장은 한 입으로 두 말 안 해.

1000654340.english: But why is everyone in swimsuits? Aren't you cold?
1000654340.korean: 근데 왜 다 수영복이야? 안 추워?

1000654341.english: There's one person who isn't. Want to guess who it is?
1000654341.korean: 아닌 사람도 한 명 끼어있어. 누군지 맞춰볼래?

1000654343.english: Just you wait until I catch you, this time I won't let you get away with it!
1000654343.korean: 잡히기만 해봐, 이번엔 가만 안 놔둬!

1000654344.english: Would you like to come and sit here? It's the warmest because it's closest to the fire.
1000654344.korean: 여기에 와서 앉으실래요? 불이랑 가까워서 제일 따뜻해요.

1000654345.english: There's nothing proper to drink, but maybe the cocoa from the combat rations...
1000654345.korean: 제대로 된 마실 건 없지만, 전투식량의 코코아라도...

1000654346.english: Oh! Sia, I've seen this before. I don't know... Are you going to ride it? I ate it on the island!
1000654346.korean: 아! 시아, 이거 본 적 있어. 몰... 타? 섬에서 먹었었어!

1000654347.english: It was delicious, but I was sad I couldn't eat much... Wow, so many boxes...
1000654347.korean: 맛있는데 많이 못 먹어서 슬펐었는데... 와아, 상자로 잔뜩...

1000654348.english: Do you want to eat it? Want some?

1000654350.english: Io, what's the tastiest thing there? Do you have any chicken noodles left?
1000654350.korean: 이오, 거기서 제일 맛있는 거 뭐 있냐? 치킨 누들 남았어?

1000654353.english: If you let it sit like this for a little while, it gets incredibly delicious. But you'll have to wait a long time.
1000654353.korean: 이러고 조금만 놔두면 엄~청 맛있어져. 근데 오래 기다려야 돼.

1000654354.english: If you touch it carelessly, you'll get burned, so my sister told me to be careful.
1000654354.korean: 함부로 만지면 화상입어서, 언니가 조심하라고 그랬어.

1000654355.english: Sister? Ah, the one with the hat.

1000654356.english: But where did your sister go? You came alone?
1000654356.korean: 근데 언니는 어디 가고 혼자 왔어?

1000654357.english: Sia, you said you were going to play by yourself!

1000654358.english: Okay, would you like some hot chocolate?

1000654359.english: I made it by melting snow. Here's yours too, Captain.

1000654361.english: Whew... It's warm, isn't it? Thank you.

1000654362.english: Hey, you two over there, cut it out and come over here. If you want to eat.
1000654362.korean: 어이, 거기 둘도 그쯤하고 와라. 밥 먹고 싶으면.

1000654364.english: Calista, I'm sorry! It's my fault. If you twist it any more, my wrist's gonna make a sound it shouldn't!
1000654364.korean: 칼리스타, 미안! 내가 잘못했어. 거기서 더 비틀면 손목에서 나서는 안 되는 소리가 나버린다구!

1000654365.english: You always make me apologize after catching me, huh? Making me sweat for nothing — what is this!
1000654365.korean: 넌 꼭 잡혀야 사과하더라? 괜히 땀 흘리게 만들고, 이게 뭐야!

1000654366.english: Ugh, I was already hungry, and now I'm even hungrier... Ugh, what? Mine's a pound cake. I don't really like it.
1000654366.korean: 으으, 안 그래도 배고팠는데 더 배고파졌어... 윽, 뭐야. 내 건 파운드 케이크네. 별로 안 좋아하는데.

1000654367.english: Hmm... then can Shia have it?

1000654370.english: ...Feels kinda weird getting thanks for something like this.

1000654371.english: Wanna talk more later and come by again? I'll make something proper next time.
1000654371.korean: 나중에 얘기하고 또 올래? 그땐 제대로 된 거 만들어줄게.

1000654373.english: Hey. We had skewers last time, do we have any leftovers?
1000654373.korean: 이오. 저번에 우리 꼬치구이 해먹었던 거, 재료 남았지?

1000654375.english: The meat just needs to age a little more... Once you get the vegetables ready, we can make it in no time.
1000654375.korean: 고기는 조금만 더 숙성시키면 되니까... 야채만 준비되면 금방 만들 수 있어요.

1000654377.english: I'll catch you sometime, so come with me. Okay?
1000654377.korean: 언제 한 번 날 잡을테니까, 언니랑 같이 와. 알았지?

1000654379.english: Sia, I'm already looking forward to it~

1000654381.english: Ugh... But where's sis...? She's not even in her room...
1000654381.korean: 으응... 근데 언니는 어디갔지...? 방에도 없구...

1000654382.english: Ah! I should ask the manager~

1000654384.english: Captain Jeon, haven't you seen Sister...? Huh?

1000654387.english: Sister, were you playing with Captain Jeon? Sia wants to play too~
1000654387.korean: 언니, 전단장님이랑 놀고 있었구나? 시아도 같이 놀래~

1000654389.english: Here, Sia. Want to come see Sister for a bit?

1000654391.english: Sister knitted it for Sia and Captain Jeon.

1000654392.english: Hehehe, it was a little cold today anyway.
1000654392.korean: 에헤헤, 안그래도 오늘 놀러다니는데 조금 추웠어.

1000654393.english: Okay. Make sure you wear it from now on.

1000654395.english: Yes! I played volleyball today too~!

1000654396.english: Yeah, Fanny Fanny, Raven, and Hunter.

1000654397.english: That must have been fun! Again?

1000654398.english: Uh... And... Oh, I ate so much delicious food!
1000654398.korean: 으응... 그리고... 아, 맛있는 거 엄~청 많이 먹었어.

1000654399.korean: - 살라시아는 그렇게 말하며 도시락통 하나를 내려놓았다.

1000654400.english: What I ate today~! Sia, I was hungry so I ate a little bit, but I asked them to pack some for you and the team leader.
1000654400.korean: 오늘 먹은 거~! 시아, 배고파서 조금씩 먹기는 했는데 언니랑 전단장님하고 먹으려고 싸달라고 했어.

1000654401.english: - What's in the lunchbox is a cheese dish and... This must be an Undine.
1000654401.korean: - 도시락통 안에 담긴 것은 치즈요리랑... 이건 운디네겠군.

1000654402.english: - And combat rations... What did you stir-fry this with? Anyway, stir-fried dishes and other things.
1000654402.korean: - 그리고 전투식량과... 이건 뭘 볶은거지? 아무튼 무언가를 볶은 요리와 기타 등등.

1000654403.english: - Each floor was packed with menus that didn't make sense in context.
1000654403.korean: - 맥락없는 메뉴들이 각 층마다 꽉꽉 눌러담겨 있었다.

1000654404.english: Let's eat quickly, okay? Sia, I'm hungry!

1000654406.english: - It's not just the members' hearts in preparing for Sia, but I never expected them to bring it to eat together...
1000654406.korean: - 시아를 위해 챙겨준 대원들의 마음도 마음이지만, 그걸 같이 먹으려고 싸올줄은...

1000654408.english: Huh? Hmm... Actually, Sia was fine because she ate a lot, little by little.
1000654408.korean: 응? 으음... 사실, 시아 조금씩 많이 먹어서 괜찮았어.

1000654410.english: No, no. It's because I'm so grateful.

1000654411.english: Let's eat quickly. Commander, over here.

1000654412.english: Next to the squadron commander~! Hehe.

1000654413.english: - The food was cold, but it was a meal that warmed the heart.

1000654415.english: But you know... Why were you and the head of the department hugging and kissing?
1000654415.korean: 근데 있지. 언니랑 전단장님, 왜 끌어안고 뽀뽀하고 있었어?

1000654417.english: Hmm... Do it for Sia too. Huh?

1000654421.english: Blueberry smoothie... How is it? That's not strange.
1000654421.korean: 블루 베리 스무디... 어때?  안 이상하지.

1000654422.english: Hahaha! What's that, Hussar! That's completely weird!
1000654422.korean: 푸핫! 그게 뭐야, 후사르! 완전 이상해!

1000654423.english: Just speak in your dialect comfortably. What's wrong, all of a sudden?
1000654423.korean: 그냥 맘 편하게 사투리 써. 왜 그래, 갑자기?

1000654424.english: Quiet, you little brat! Even so, with so many people around, how can you speak in dialect?
1000654424.korean: 조용해라, 가시나야! 암만 그래도 사람들 이마이 많은데 우예 사투리 쓰는데.

1000654425.english: Ahem... I should start trying now to make standard Japanese sound natural.

1000654426.english: Well? I think it's actually more natural for you to speak with a dialect.
1000654426.korean: 글쎄? 난 네가 사투리를 쓰는 게 오히려 자연스럽다고 생각하는데.

1000654427.english: It's because they had to be deployed into battle in a hurry and used whatever language modules they had available in the process. Even someone who doesn't know will understand once they hear the reason.
1000654427.korean: 애초에 급하게 전투에 투입돼야되서 언어 모듈을 되는대로 써서 그런 거잖아. 모르는 사람도 이유를 듣고 나면 이해할걸.

1000654428.english: No, that's not possible. This is a matter of honor for the Orbital Watchers.
1000654428.korean: 아니야, 그럴 수는 없어. 이건 오비탈 와쳐의 체면이 달린 문제야.

1000654429.english: And since the commander also speaks standard Korean, we should unify the language we use.
1000654429.korean: 그리고 사령관님도 표준어를 쓰시니까, 사용하는 말을 통일해야지.

1000654432.english: That's the real purpose, isn't it? Because I didn't want to show the boss my dialect.
1000654432.korean: 그게 진짜 목적이지? 대장 앞에서 사투리 쓰는 거 보여주기 싫어서.

1000654434.english: What? If that's the case, I don't think you need to worry.
1000654434.korean: 뭐야, 그거면 걱정하지 않아도 될 것 같은데.

1000654435.english: On the contrary, the boss might find it even cuter that you speak in dialect.
1000654435.korean: 오히려 대장은 사투리 쓰는 걸 더 귀여워할 수도 있다구.

1000654437.english: I don't think the commander would mind, but...

1000654438.english: I think Sister Hussar's efforts are not wrong. They are a way of caring for others.
1000654438.korean: 후사르 언니의 노력도 틀리지 않다고 생각해요. 다른 사람을 배려하는 일이니까요.

1000654439.english: Coco is the only one who really understands me!
1000654439.korean: 역시 내 맘 알아주는 건 코코밖에 없데이!

1000654441.english: Whew, Hussar sister. I can't breathe...!
1000654441.korean: 후, 후사르 언니. 숨 쉬기 힘들어요...!

1000654442.english: Haha! It's impossible not to speak in dialect, even in front of Coco.
1000654442.korean: 하핫! 코코 앞에서도 사투리 안 쓰긴 글렀다.

1000654443.english: Thetis, it definitely seems like bunny girls are popular these days. All the kids are wearing them and walking around.
1000654443.korean: 테티스, 확실히 요즘 바니걸이 유행인가봐. 애들 다 입고 돌아다니잖아.

1000654444.english: Shouldn't we have done it with that too?

1000654446.english: The outfit Thetis prepared is exactly what will completely captivate the perverted commander's attention!
1000654446.korean: 테티스가 준비한 의상이야말로, 변태 사령관님의 시선을 확 사로잡을 거라구~

1000654448.english: I heard it's popular these days.

1000654449.english: What exactly was it good for again...? Um...

1000654450.english: I heard from the other sisters that the commander likes this outfit.
1000654450.korean: 다른 언니들한테 들은 이야기인데, 사령관님이 좋아하시는 복장이래요.

1000654452.english: Oh! That's right, that's right! I've heard that too.
1000654452.korean: 아! 맞다, 맞다! 나도 들은 적 있어.

1000654453.english: I heard it was used to express the loyalty of vassals or was a high-class garment worn only by elites.
1000654453.korean: 신하의 충심을 표현하거나 엘리트들만 입던 고급의상이기도 했다던데?

1000654455.english: I don't think I've heard that far, but that's a truly amazing outfit.
1000654455.korean: 저는 거기까진 못 들어봤던 것 같은데, 정말 굉장한 복장이네요.

1000654456.english: That's what I heard. I was wondering if I should try it on...

1000654457.english: It's not suitable attire for battle, so I've lost interest. You too, Hussar?
1000654457.korean: 전투에 쓸 만한 복장은 아니라 흥미가 식었어. 너도 그렇지, 후사르?

1000654461.english: Are you listening to me? You're acting strange today.
1000654461.korean: 내 말 듣고 있어? 너 오늘 이상하다.

1000654462.english: What, what's wrong? It's no different than usual.
1000654462.korean: 뭐, 뭐가 이상한데. 평소랑 다를 것 없꾸마.

1000654464.english: We're about to go on an exploration, and it'll be dangerous if you act like this there too.
1000654464.korean: 곧 있으면 탐사 나가야 하는데, 거기서도 이러면 위험해.

1000654465.english: Shall we rest here today? It's okay if Coco and I go alone for a day or so. To the boss, I'm...
1000654465.korean: 오늘은 여기서 쉴래? 하루 정도는 코코랑 나만 가도 괜찮아. 대장한테는 내가...

1000654466.english: Oh, my goodness...! Hmm, no. There's no problem.
1000654466.korean: 아이...! 흠흠, 아냐. 아무 문제 없어.

1000654467.english: Are we heading toward the iceberg again this time?
1000654467.korean: 이번에도 우리가 빙산 쪽으로 가는 거지?

1000654468.english: That's right! You'll observe, and Coco and I will break the ice to retrieve the supplies inside.
1000654468.korean: 그렇지! 너가 관측하고 나랑 코코가 얼음을 깨부숴서 그 안의 물자를 가져올 거야.

1000654469.english: It's been a while since we had a battle, and my body is itching for action. Let's smash some ice! I'll have to break it.
1000654469.korean: 한동안 전투가 없어서 몸도 근질근질한데, 얼음이라도 쾅쾅! 깨부숴줘야지.

1000654471.english: Yes, sisters. White Shell and I are ready.

1000654472.english: Okay, let's finish eating this and then leave.
1000654472.korean: 그래, 그럼 이것만 마저 먹고 출발하자.

1000654473.english: I should tell the commander the good news.

1000654474.english: - What happens to a person when their work disappears in an instant?
1000654474.korean: - 하던 일이 한순간에 사라지면 인간은 어떻게 되는가.

1000654475.english: - Thru this experience, I realized. That humans become endlessly powerless if they don't do something.
1000654475.korean: - 이번 경험을 통해 깨달았다. 인간은 뭔가를 하지 않으면 한없이 무기력해진다는 것을.

1000654476.english: - I've been wandering the hallway until I have something to do, and I've been doing this for hours already...
1000654476.korean: - 할 게 생길 때까지 복도를 돌아다니고 있는데, 벌써 몇 시간째 이러고 있는지...

1000654477.english: - It was when I was discovering the graffiti carved on the corridor wall and guessing which of the children might have done it.
1000654477.korean: - 통로 벽면에 새겨진 낙서를 발견하며 아이들 중 누구 소행일지 추측하고 있을 때였다.

1000654479.english: Hussar, belonging to the Orbital Watchers. And Spartoia, Coco, and I just returned from completing our glacier exploration.
1000654479.korean: 오비탈 와쳐 소속, 후사르. 그리고 스파토이아, 코코 셋이서 빙하 탐사를 마치고 지금 막 복귀했습니다.

1000654480.english: I sent the relevant materials to the panel, but haven't received a response, so I came in person.
1000654480.korean: 관련된 자료를 패널로 보내드렸는데, 답변이 없으셔서 직접 찾아왔습니다.

1000654481.english: - I told him what happened with Armand, and the Hussar nodded.
1000654481.korean: - 아르망과 있었던 일을 이야기했더니 후사르가 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000654482.english: Oh, I remember seeing it the other day. It's been implemented starting today, hasn't it?
1000654482.korean: 아, 일전에 본 기억이 납니다. 오늘부터 시행됐군요.

1000654483.english: - I tried using the joke I shared with Vanilla again, but Hussar got serious.
1000654483.korean: - 바닐라와 나눴던 농담을 다시 써먹어봤는데 후사르가 정색했다.

1000654485.english: Just being near the commander gives me strength. To lose the meaning of existence? Absolutely not!
1000654485.korean: 사령관님은 곁에 있는 것만으로도 힘이 나는 분이세요. 존재의의를 상실하다니, 절대 그럴 일 없습니다!

1000654486.english: To us, the commander is that important...!

1000654487.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry. I just couldn't help myself...

1000654488.english: ... We found more supplies during this exploration than before. I wanted to tell the commander in person, but...
1000654488.korean: ...이번 탐사에서 전보다 많은 물자를 발견했습니다. 사령관님께 직접 전해드리고 싶었는데...

1000654491.english: I don't have any other business. However...

1000654492.english: - Hussar, who had been pursing his lips, shook his head.

1000654494.english: - I remembered my panel being confiscated. It's incredibly inconvenient now that we don't have any means of communication.
1000654494.korean: - 패널을 압수당한 걸 떠올렸다. 통신수단이 없어지니 불편한 게 이만저만 아니구나.

1000654498.english: I should have been more straightforward and asked for a reward...
1000654498.korean: 좀 더 솔직하게 포상 달라고 말해볼걸...

1000654500.english: Oh, you little girl... Why can't you be honest only at times like this...?
1000654500.korean: 아이구, 가시나야... 왜 이럴 때만 솔직하지 못 한 긴데...

1000654502.english: Huh? Hussar, you're here? You came at just the right time.
1000654502.korean: 응? 후사르, 왔어? 마침 잘 왔다.

1000654503.english: Come to think of it, the boss and the panel were taken, right? Haha! So, of course, you won't get a reply.
1000654503.korean: 생각해보니까 대장, 패널 뺏겼잖아? 하핫! 그러니까 당연히 답장 못 받지.

1000654505.english: ... Sister, are you okay? What happened?

1000654506.english: Yeah, I haven't seen them sigh in months.
1000654506.korean: 그러게, 나 쟤 한숨쉬는 거 몇 달 만에 본다.

1000654507.english: Was it when I saw you using dialect with the boss? Is it the same thing again today?
1000654507.korean: 대장한테 사투리 쓰는 거 보였을 때였나. 오늘도 똑같은 일이야?

1000654509.english: My ears sting~ I thought I'd eaten a train car fire.
1000654509.korean: 귀 따가워~ 기차 화통이라도 삶아먹은 줄 알았네.

1000654510.english: Then why are you like that?

1000654512.english: Why? You haven't met the Captain?

1000654513.english: Um... I'll go check where the Commander is!
1000654513.korean: 저기... 코코가 사령관님 어디에 계시는지 알아보고 올게요!

1000654514.english: Aida, it's fine. I already met with them.

1000654515.english: Then what? When we reported our results, the Commander didn't think much of them?
1000654515.korean: 그럼 왜? 우리 실적도 보고했을 때, 대장이 별로래?

1000654516.english: T-the Commander isn't someone who'd say that...

1000654517.english: Aida said we did great and even praised us. Seriously, nothing happened.
1000654517.korean: 아이다, 대단하다고 칭찬해주셨다. 진짜 별일 없었데이.

1000654519.english: Come on, there's no way you'd be this down if nothing happened. What is it?
1000654519.korean: 뭐야, 아무 일도 없는데 네가 풀 죽을리 없잖아. 무슨 일인데.

1000654520.english: You've got to say something if you want help. Don't keep worrying us like this.
1000654520.korean: 뭐라도 말을 해야 도와줄 수 있지. 걱정되게 자꾸 그러지 마.

1000654522.english: Ah! Hussar, you know that bunny girl outfit from this time?
1000654522.korean: 아! 후사르 언니, 이번에 바니걸 의상 있잖아요.

1000654523.english: Why don't you try it on?
1000654523.korean: 그거 한 번 입어보시는 게 어때요?

1000654525.english: Bunny girl...? I mean, it's not like it helps in battle or anything... is there really a reason to wear something like that?
1000654525.korean: 바니걸....? 글쎄, 싸우는데 도움도 안 되고... 그런 걸 입을 필요가 있나?

1000654528.english: Ohhh, I see how it is, Hussar!

1000654529.english: W-what are you saying, girl! Don't make a fuss...
1000654529.korean: 뭐, 뭐라카는데 가시나야! 호들갑 떨지 마라...

1000654530.english: Don't deny it! It's written all over your face.

1000654531.english: If that's all it is, no problem. Hold on, I'll bring one that's perfect for you.
1000654531.korean: 그런 거라면 간단하지. 기다려 봐, 내가 너한테 딱 맞는 거 가져다줄게.

1000654532.english: Coco! Where did you find that bunny girl outfit?

1000654533.english: Uh, it was in the info sector — where they're temporarily storing clothing and gear. But I don't think there's any left now.
1000654533.korean: 그, 정보 구역쪽에 피복류를 임시로 모아두는 곳에서요. 하지만 더 남아있는 건 없을 거예요.

1000654536.english: I-I'm not interested in that kind of thing, either...!

1000654541.english: Honestly, I am interested... I want to get closer to Big Brotherya too...
1000654541.korean: 솔직히 관심 있다... 내도 오빠야랑 가까워지고 싶데이...

1000654542.english: We barely ever see each other unless it's for work... If Big Brotherya likes bunny girls, I want to try wearing one and go see him...
1000654542.korean: 업무 아니면 만날 일도 드무니까... 오빠야가 바니걸이란 걸 좋아하면 입고 찾아가보고 싶지...

1000654544.english: Why are you even asking something so obvious! Of course I'll help!
1000654544.korean: 뭘 뻔한 걸 묻고 그래! 당연히 도와야지!

1000654545.english: We're all part of the Orbital Watch! Right, Coco?
1000654545.korean: 우린 오비탈 와쳐 소속 동료잖아! 안 그래, 코코?

1000654546.english: Of course. So, shall we go together?

1000654547.english: Let's find the perfect bunny girl outfit for Hussar!
1000654547.korean: 후사르 언니한테 딱 맞는 바니걸 복장을 찾아서!

1000654548.english: With the three of us looking, we're finding them super fast.

1000654549.english: Where did you two get yours?

1000654551.english: I asked her to check Supply Depot No. 2 in Valhalla — she found a few there.
1000654551.korean: 발할라의 2종 보급창고에 몇 개 있는 걸 부탁드려서 가져왔죠.

1000654552.english: Why does Valhalla even have bunny outfits?

1000654553.english: They said it's something from an old mission — they used to keep it for infiltration purposes.
1000654553.korean: 옛날 임무에 사용하던 걸 지금도 보관하고 있던 거라던데... 잠입 용도로 쓰였대요.

1000654554.english: I found mine in the clothing storage area.

1000654555.english: Huh? Didn't Coco say there weren't any left there?
1000654555.korean: 응? 거기 코코가 없다고 하지 않았나?

1000654556.english: There shouldn't have been any bunny girl outfits left — how did you find one?
1000654556.korean: 바니걸은 안 남아있었을 텐데, 어떻게 찾으셨어요?

1000654557.english: I asked some of the girls who found theirs earlier if they'd be willing to trade sizes that didn't fit.
1000654557.korean: 먼저 찾은 애들 중에 안 맞는 사이즈면 다른 거랑 교환할 수 있냐고 물어봤지.

1000654558.english: I had to give up a bunch of my tuna cans and casual clothes in return though... ugh...
1000654558.korean: 대신에 내가 갖고 있던 참치캔이나 사복을 많이 썼지만... 으음...

1000654561.english: I think this should be enough. There's no guarantee we'll find any more.
1000654561.korean: 이만하면 충분할 것 같은데. 더 남았단 보장도 없고.

1000654562.english: But this outfit's going to be shown to the Commander. If it's not perfect...

1000654563.english: No, this won't do — I'll go check around one more time.
1000654563.korean: 아무래도 안 되겠어, 나 다시 한번 둘러보고 올게.

1000654564.english: How about trying them on and seeing if any feel right first?
1000654564.korean: 한번 입어보고 마음에 드는 게 있는지 확인해보는 건 어때요?

1000654565.english: That's a good idea. Yeah, no matter how many we gather, you're only going to wear one in the end, right?
1000654565.korean: 그거 좋은 생각이다. 맞네, 아무리 많이 찾아봤자 결국 하나만 입잖아?

1000654566.english: And if none of them work out, the three of us can go looking again.
1000654566.korean: 전부 마음에 안 들면 그때 또 셋이서 찾아보자.

1000654567.english: Alright, then let's each try one on...

1000654570.english: What's wrong? Already don't like any of them?

1000654571.english: Come on, at least try them on. We worked really hard to collect these.
1000654571.korean: 그러지 말고 입어나 봐. 겨우겨우 모은 것들인데.

1000654573.english: Now that I think about it… these outfits… the backs are all, like, totally open — are these even real clothes…?
1000654573.korean: 다시 생각해 보니 이 옷들, 조금... 뒤에 다 파여있는데 진짜 옷 맞나...?

1000654574.english: Ah, well… yeah, that's… kinda true…

1000654576.english: Spartoia, did you see the message just now?
1000654576.korean: 스파토이아 언니, 지금 연락 온 거 보셨어요?

1000654577.english: A massive iceberg… confirmed to have a large stockpile of supplies.

1000654578.english: Coco and I just got a support request.

1000654579.english: Really? Why didn't I get any message? I'll get ready too.
1000654579.korean: 그래? 왜 나한텐 연락 안 왔지. 나도 준비할게.

1000654580.english: No need — Valhalla's already handling the recon. Looks like they just need help with the extraction.
1000654580.korean: 아니야, 관측은 이미 발할라 쪽에서 하고 있대. 발파만 도와주면 될 것 같아.

1000654581.english: WhiteShell, Spartoia, and I will head out real quick!
1000654581.korean: 저랑 화이트셸이랑 스파토이아 언니랑 금방 다녀올게요!

1000654582.english: Until we're back, try some outfits on, okay, Hussar?
1000654582.korean: 저희가 돌아오기 전까지 먼저 입어보고 계세요, 후사르 언니.

1000654583.english: Yeah! Tell us your thoughts when we're back. That way we'll know if we need to look for more or not.
1000654583.korean: 그래! 다녀오면 소감 말해줘, 그래야 더 찾든 말든 하지.

1000654584.english: You better try them on. Got it?

1000654585.english: ...What do I do… I was excited while we were collecting them, but now that I'm actually going to wear one...
1000654585.korean: 어떡하지... 구할 땐 기대됐는데, 막상 입을라니까...

1000654586.english: There are holes everywhere... Is this really a piece of clothing...?
1000654586.korean: 여기저기 다 뚫려가꼬... 이게 진짜 옷 맞나...?

1000654588.english: B-but the Commander said he liked them, so...

1000654589.english: I… I should try it on, right…?

1000654591.english: This one really does fit me perfectly but…

1000654592.english: W-wow, it's way more embarrassing than I thought. Still…

1000654593.english: With this, even the commander... No, my brother will be happy too...

1000654594.english: Since you said you like bunny girls... Yes, my body isn't inferior to others...
1000654594.korean: 바니걸을 좋아한다 캤으니까... 내, 내 몸도 다른 사람들에 비해 꿀리진 않고...

1000654596.english: Get a grip, you little brat! If you go in here feeling defeated, even things that could have worked out won't!
1000654596.korean: 정신 차리라, 가시나야! 여기서부터 기 죽고 들어가면 될 것도 안 된데이!

1000654597.english: Confidently! Yes, I'm going out with confidence!

1000654598.english: But no matter how I look at it, I'm incredibly embarrassed... Digging into the flesh here and there...
1000654598.korean: 근데 암만 봐도 억수로 부끄럽다... 살 여기저기 파고 들어가...

1000654599.english: So, is that the long one that your older brother likes?

1000654601.english: Big Brother... My brother said it was my style, so I tried it on...
1000654601.korean: 오빠야... 오빠야가 취향이라 캐서 함 입어봤데이...

1000654602.english: Even if you look closely... What part does Big Brotherya like...? Here...? Or here...?
1000654602.korean: 잘 봐도... 오빠야가 좋아하는 부분이 어디인데...? 여기...? 아니면 여기...?

1000654605.english: If I seduce him this aggressively, even my brother wouldn't be able to resist. And then, right away... That, what lovers do...
1000654605.korean: 이래 적극적으로 유혹하면 오빠야라도 못 참겠제. 그러다 바로... 그, 사랑하는 남녀간에 하는...

1000654606.english: ... Ugh~! I wasn't this loose before, but wow, this is how it is now... If anyone sees, I'll be embarrassed, you know?
1000654606.korean: ...으으~! 내 이래 발랑 까진 애 아니었는데 와 이라지... 누가 보기라도 하믄 남사시러워가, 어?

1000654607.english: What is it? You're already here? You came early.

1000654608.english: What are you doing? Come in quickly. I was just about to find something that fits me perfectly and go to my brother...
1000654608.korean: 뭐하는데, 빨리 들어온나. 안 그래도 내랑 딱 맞는 거 찾아가 이제 오빠야한테...

1000654610.english: - I'm still bothered by the actions Hussar showed before.
1000654610.korean: - 아무래도 이전에 후사르가 보여줬던 행동이 맘에 걸린다.

1000654611.english: - It seemed like you had something you wanted to say, but you're holding back...
1000654611.korean: - 하고 싶은 말이 있었던 것 같은데 꾹 참는 것 같은...

1000654612.english: - Since we have plenty of time anyway, we decided to go find the Orbital Watcher's lodging...
1000654612.korean: - 어차피 시간도 많으니, 오비탈 와쳐의 속소를 찾아가기로 했는데...

1000654614.english: Big Brother... My brother said it was my style, so I tried it on...
1000654614.korean: 오빠야... 오빠야가 취향이라 캐서 함 입어봤데이...

1000654615.english: Even if you look closely... What part of the bunny girl does Big Brotherya like? Here...? Or here...?
1000654615.korean: 잘 봐도... 오빠야가 좋아하는 바니걸 부위가 어디인데...? 여기...? 아니면 여기...?

1000654616.english: - Where did the rumor that I like bunny girls spread from? More than that, it's the unfamiliar tone of voice, so different from Hussar's usual, and the proactive dialog that's strange.
1000654616.korean: - 내가 바니걸을 좋아한다는 소문이 어디서 퍼진 거지? 그보다 평소 후사르와 전혀 다른 말투, 적극적인 대사가 낯선데.

1000654617.english: - I stopped my hand just as I was about to knock on the door and stood there quietly...
1000654617.korean: - 문을 두드리려던 손을 멈춘 채, 가만히 서있는데...

1000654620.english: - A laugh I had never heard before erupted from across the way.
1000654620.korean: - 건너편에서 한번도 들어보지 못한 웃음소리가 터져 나왔다.

1000654621.english: If I seduce him this aggressively, even my brother wouldn't be able to resist. And then, right away... That, what lovers do...
1000654621.korean: 이래 적극적으로 유혹하면 오빠야라도 못 참겠제. 그러다 바로... 그, 사랑하는 남녀간에 하는...

1000654622.english: ... Ugh~! I wasn't this loose before, but wow, this is how it is now... If anyone sees, I'll be embarrassed, you know?
1000654622.korean: ...으으~! 내 이래 발랑 까진 애 아니었는데 와 이라지... 누가 보기라도 하믄 남사시러워가, 어?

1000654623.english: What is it? You're already here? You came early.

1000654624.english: - Did you know I was coming? That was unexpected.
1000654624.korean: - 내가 온 걸 알고 있었나? 의외였다.

1000654625.english: What are you doing? Come in quickly.

1000654626.english: - I was going to leave without saying anything, but if you're calling out to me knowing it's me...
1000654626.korean: - 말 없이 돌아가려 했는데, 나란 걸 알면서 부르는 거라면...

1000654627.english: - To answer Hussar's heart, I opened the door and went in.
1000654627.korean: - 후사르의 마음에 응하기 위해서 문을 열고 들어갔다.

1000654629.english: I was just about to find something that fits me perfectly and go to my brother...
1000654629.korean: 안 그래도 내랑 딱 맞는 거 찾아가 이제 오빠야한테...

1000654631.english: - As soon as I opened the door, I realized I was wrong.
1000654631.korean: - 문을 열자마자 내 생각이 틀렸다는 걸 깨달았다.

1000654632.english: - Hussar... Because he was frozen like an ice sculpture.

1000654634.english: Where did you start listening from?

1000654639.english: Get out of here, what are you doing!

1000654640.english: - Hussar shouted and started throwing things around him at me.
1000654640.korean: - 후사르가 소리치며 주변에 있는 것들을 내게 집어 던지기 시작했다.

1000654641.english: - Something covered my face, and it went dark in front of my eyes.

1000654642.english: - The soft texture of the fabric felt thru my fingertips, and the warmth I could feel suggested that Hussar had just been wearing...
1000654642.korean: - 손 끝으로 전해져오는 부드러운 천의 촉감, 따뜻한 온기가 느껴지는 걸로 보아 정황상 후사르가 방금까지 입고 있던...

1000654646.english: - I don't know how much time it took to calm down the hussar. I think I've calmed down a bit now...
1000654646.korean: - 후사르를 달래느라 얼마나 많은 시간이 걸렸는지 모르겠다. 이제 좀 차분해진 것 같은데...

1000654647.english: Leave it alone... It's all over...

1000654648.english: With a dialect, rambling on by themselves... Furthermore...

1000654649.english: Um... And then you even threw that at the commander's face... Sob...
1000654649.korean: 그... 그것까지 사령관님 얼굴에 던져삐고... 흑...

1000654650.english: How can I not care! Are you made of iron nerves, Commander?
1000654650.korean: 어떻게 신경 안 쓰는데요! 사령관님은 무쇠 신경입니까!

1000654651.english: - I said it to try and comfort them, but it backfired.

1000654652.english: Chiara... Someone like me isn't even pretty... It's not good to use a dialect like that, it sounds unsophisticated.
1000654652.korean: 치아라... 내 같은 건 예쁘지도 않고... 촌시럽게 사투리나 써가 별로다 아이가...

1000654655.english: ... Really? Do you really think that?

1000654656.english: Really...? So that's what it means...

1000654657.english: Hehe... Big Brother, do you think my dialect is cute...?

1000654658.english: - It seems like the way I address him has changed naturally, but since Hussar's voice is brighter than before, I decided to just let it go.
1000654658.korean: - 뭔가 자연스럽게 호칭이 바뀐 것 같지만 아까보다 후사르의 목소리가 밝아졌으니 그냥 넘어가기로 했다.

1000654659.english: Um, well then... What are you wearing right now? What do you think about a bunny girl outfit?
1000654659.korean: 그, 그라믄... 지금 입고 있는 건? 바니걸 옷은 우예 생각하는데?

1000654660.english: Say it again. I want to hear it from my older brother again.
1000654660.korean: 다시 한번 말해도. 오빠야한테 또 듣고 싶다.

1000654662.english: ... Is that the best you can do, big brother?

1000654664.english: Ha, say it one more time!

1000654666.english: It's been a while since I've seen Hussar that happy.
1000654666.korean: 후사르 언니가 저렇게 기뻐하시는 거 간만에 봐요.

1000654667.english: I'm glad it went well for you too.
1000654667.korean: 잘 풀린 것 같아서 저도 기쁘네요.

1000654670.english: That, that impulsive personality of mine is really...

1000654671.english: That person doesn't seem to realize how embarrassing they're being, do they? I'm going to kick off the covers tomorrow morning.
1000654671.korean: 쟤, 자기가 얼마나 부끄러운 짓을 하고 있는지 모르는 것 같은데? 내일 아침에 이불 좀 차겠어.

1000654672.english: ... It's better to be happy today than to worry about tomorrow.
1000654672.korean: ...내일을 걱정하는 것보다 오늘 행복한 게 낫죠.

1000654673.english: Congratulations from the bottom of my heart, Hussar Big Sis.

1000654674.english: So pretty, so pretty, so pretty!

1000654675.english: Ehehehe... One more time! Hm? Hurry up~
1000654675.korean: 에헤헤헤.... 한번 더! 응? 빨리 해도~

1000654676.english: < I wasn't having dirty thoughts! > END.

1000654678.english: Ah... Right. You said you were giving that to Salacia too.

1000654683.english: Thanks. Where does Salacia want to sit?

1000654687.english: Oh, there was a drawing here too.

1000654690.english: Yeah. That's why I'm currently unemployed. Lost my sense of purpose.
1000654690.korean: 맞아. 그래서 지금 무직이야. 존재의의를 상실했지.

1000654693.english: No, it's fine. Anything unusual during the exploration?
1000654693.korean: 아냐, 괜찮아. 탐사 중 특이사항 있어?

1000654694.english: Still, it's a relief I heard it directly. You've been through a lot.
1000654694.korean: 그래도 직접 들었으니까 다행이다. 고생 많았어.

1000654697.english: Got it. If you need anything later, contact me... ah.
1000654697.korean: 알았어. 나중에 필요하면 또 연락... 아.

1000654698.english: If nothing's going on, I'll be in the captain's quarters, so feel free to drop by.
1000654698.korean: 별 일 없으면 함장실에 있을 테니까, 편하게 찾아와.

1000654706.english: I was just wandering around and dropped by for a bit...

1000654707.english: ...Ever since you cleared your throat like ahem.

1000654709.english: Oh, the outfit really suits you.

1000654716.english: You don't have to worry about it.

1000654719.english: Using a dialect isn't tacky at all.

1000654725.english: Hussar, you're cute. The prettiest in the world!

1000654733.english: - Right in front of me now, there's Lise.

1000654736.english: Master, hurry! This is the only way!

1000654737.english: Lord, Master... are you really alright...?

1000654739.english: - This situation goes back to just a moment ago.
1000654739.korean: - 지금 이 상황은 조금 전으로 거슬러 올라간다.

1000654742.english: ...I think Daphne's opinion is the most reasonable, as expected.
1000654742.korean: …역시 다프네의 의견이 제일 무난할 것 같아요.

1000654745.english: I'm worried it might take too long...

1000654747.english: Lise is shy and avoids her master, but in her heart, she longs to be loved by her master even more than that.
1000654747.korean: 부끄러워서 주인님을 피해 다니는 리제지만, 마음 속에는 그것 이상으로 주인님께 사랑을 받고 싶은 마음이 가득할 거예요.

1000654748.english: Poor Sister Lise... If that kind of thing continues for a long time, her heart will get sick...
1000654748.korean: 가여운 리제 언니… 그런게 오랜 시간 계속되면, 마음이 병들어버릴텐데...

1000654749.english: That's right. So, I'd like to find a way to progress the relationship as quickly as possible...
1000654749.korean: 맞아요. 그래서 가급적 빠르게 관계를 진전시킬 방법을 찾고 싶은데…

1000654750.english: Sister, a while ago I tried having the master's procedure done by Sister Lise.
1000654750.korean: 언니, 얼마전에 주인님의 시술을 리제 언니한테 맡기는 걸 시도해봤어요.

1000654752.english: Uh, um... I don't know if I should be happy or sad about that...
1000654752.korean: 으, 으음… 그건 기뻐해야 할지 슬퍼해야 할지…

1000654753.english: To overcome that immense embarrassment... Sister Lise must really love the Master...
1000654753.korean: 그 어마어마한 부끄러움을 이겨낼정도로… 리제 언니는 주인님을 사랑하는 거군요…

1000654754.english: - The dryad's words seemed to snap me back to my senses.
1000654754.korean: - 드리아드의 말에 번뜩 정신이 드는 것 같았다.

1000654755.english: - Surely, Lise is too shy to even look at me, let alone touch me. When you kissed me lightly before, I almost fainted.
1000654755.korean: - 분명 리제는 날 만지는 것은 커녕, 보는 것도 부끄러워한다. 이전에 가볍게 키스해줬을 때는 기절할 정도로.

1000654756.english: - And yet, when it comes to doing things for me, you endure...
1000654756.korean: - 그런데도, 날 위한 일을 할 때면 참아낸다는 건…

1000654758.english: Yeah. It's... to tie up Sister Lise so she can't run away, and then the Master will definitely give her a big hug.
1000654758.korean: 응. 바로… 리제 언니가 도망가지 못하도록 꽁꽁 묶어놓고, 주인님이 꼭~ 끌어안아주는 거야.

1000654761.english: The problem is that Lise-nee-san keeps running away.
1000654761.korean: 리제 언니가 계속 도망가는 게 문제인 거니까.

1000654762.english: If she could just feel Master's love in your arms once, I'm sure she'd be okay too.
1000654762.korean: 품에 안겨서 주인님의 사랑을 한 번 느껴보면, 분명 리제 언니도 괜찮아질 거야.

1000654763.english: Alright then—I'll go get everything ready right away!

1000654766.english: Yes... If it weren't for this, even if Master had suggested it first, I would've stopped them.
1000654766.korean: 네… 아니었으면 만약 주인님이 먼저 제안하셨더라도 말렸을 거예요.

1000654767.english: Sister, just hold on a little longer.

1000654769.english: - I looked directly at the struggling Lise and approached.

1000654771.english: - I very slowly and carefully held the frozen Lise in my arms.
1000654771.korean: - 얼어붙어버린 리제를 아주 천천히, 조심스럽게 품에 안았다.

1000654775.english: - Rapid breathing and a trembling body. However, Lise is resting her chin on my shoulder and clinging to me in her own quiet way.
1000654775.korean: - 가쁜 호흡과 덜덜 떨리는 몸. 하지만 리제는 내 어깨에 턱을 얹고 나름대로 얌전히 안겨있다.

1000654777.english: Master, now! Hurry and say the magic word I told you!
1000654777.korean: 주인님, 지금야! 어서 내가 알려준 마법의 단어를!

1000654778.english: - Holding Lise, who was slowly calming down, even tighter, I whispered in her ear.
1000654778.korean: - 천천히 안정되어가는 리제를 더욱 꽉 끌어안으며, 귓가에 속삭였다.

1000654782.english: - Lise's body, cradled in his arms, went limp.
1000654782.korean: - 품에 안긴 리제의 몸이 축 늘어졌다

1000654785.english: - I waited outside the infirmary for a moment, and then Rhea sighed and came out into the hallway.
1000654785.korean: - 의무실 밖에서 잠시 기다리고 있자, 레아가 한숨을 쉬며 복도로 나왔다.

1000654786.english: She's resting now. Daphne and Dryad are taking care of her.
1000654786.korean: 안정을 취하고 있어요. 다프네랑 드리아드가 간호하고 있구요.

1000654787.english: I-I'm sorry... I didn't think it would turn out like this...

1000654788.english: It's okay. Lise will wake up soon.

1000654789.english: - The Fairy series models are all derived from Rhea. The meaning of this is that they are actually closer to being sisters or mother and daughter.
1000654789.korean: - 페어리 시리즈는 전부 레아에게서 파생된 모델이다. 이 말의 의미는 이들이 실제 자매, 혹은 모녀 관계에 가깝다는 것.

1000654790.english: - Lise, Daphne, and the Dryad all share some of Rhea's personality traits... and Aqua is no exception.
1000654790.korean: - 리제, 다프네, 드리아드 모두 레아의 성격적 특성을 조금씩 갖고 있고… 그건 아쿠아도 예외는 아니다.

1000654792.english: - However, the one difference is... since Aqua's physical and mental age is that of a child, her personality traits haven't manifested.
1000654792.korean: - 다만 한가지 다른 점은… 아쿠아의 신체와 정신 연령은 아동이기 때문에, 그 성격적인 특성이 발현되지는 않았다는 점.

1000654793.english: - But put another way, it could manifest at any time.
1000654793.korean: - 하지만 그걸 달리 말한다면, 언제든 발현될 수 있다는 것.

1000654794.english: - I just hope Aqua is kind and healthy...
1000654794.korean: - 나는 그저 아쿠아가 착하고 건강하기만을 바랄 뿐이다…

1000654796.english: Aqua, you don't have to be so upset. Lise said she wanted to try it too, and it was fine until the master actually hugged her, wasn't it?
1000654796.korean: 아쿠아, 너무 속상해하지 않아도 돼요. 리제도 해보겠다고 했고, 실제로 주인님이 안아주실 때까지는 괜찮았잖아요.

1000654797.english: And since Aqua has helped this much, now it's the master and sister's turn to give it their all. Aqua has gone to play with her friends.
1000654797.korean: 그리고 아쿠아가 이만큼이나 도와줬으니까, 이제는 주인님이랑 언니가 힘내볼게요. 아쿠아는 가서 친구들이랑 놀고 있어요.

1000654800.english: - Rhea, who had calmed Aqua, let out a small sigh.
1000654800.korean: - 아쿠아를 달랜 레아가 작게 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000654801.english: Now... is there nothing left but to leave it to time...?

1000654805.english: They said they want to keep trying...

1000654807.english: So, about that... How about trying it this way...?

1000654810.english: This is... eating strawberries... it's okay...

1000654812.english: - Lise's problem stems from being overly conscious of physical contact with me. Then what if we cover it up with a different action?
1000654812.korean: - 리제의 문제는 나와 스킨십을 한다는 것을 지나치게 의식해서 발생하는 것. 그렇다면 다른 행동으로 덮어씌운다면 어떨까?

1000654813.english: - First, I'm holding a strawberry, which has been on the table a lot lately, halfway in my mouth, and Lise is eating that strawberry.
1000654813.korean: - 일단 내가 요즘 유난히 식탁에 자주 오르는 딸기를 입에 반쯤 물고 있고, 리제는 그 딸기를 먹는다.

1000654814.english: Considering the size of the strawberry, your lips are bound to touch.
1000654814.korean: - 딸기의 크기를 고려했을 때, 서로의 입술이 무조건 닿을 수밖에 없다.

1000654815.english: - ...Lise's enthusiasm was so great that I reluctantly agreed, but honestly, I didn't think there was much of a chance.
1000654815.korean: - …리제의 열의가 대단해서 어쩔 수 없이 승낙하긴 했지만, 솔직히 큰 가능성은 없다고 생각했다.

1000654816.english: - But... that's not the problem right now.

1000654818.english: Are you eating strawberries or are you eating strawberries? Are you eating strawberries or are you eating strawberries? Are you eating strawberries or are you eating strawberries?!

1000654819.english: - Because Lise is showing us her old, missed self after a very long time...
1000654819.korean: - 리제가 아주 오랜만에… 그리운 예전 모습을 보여주고 있으니까.

1000654821.english: - Lise slowly approached me. Surprisingly, it seems the suggestion worked, and they don't appear particularly embarrassed.
1000654821.korean: - 리제가 조금씩 내게 다가왔다. 놀랍게도 암시가 효과가 있는지, 딱히 부끄러워하는 기색은 보이지 않는다.

1000654822.english: - Their faces get closer and closer, and Lise's glossy lips slowly part.
1000654822.korean: - 얼굴이 점점 더 가까워지고 리제의 윤기나는 입술이 천천히 벌어진다.

1000654823.english: - And just before their lips met...

1000654829.english: - I treated my injured tongue and brought Lise to the captain's cabin.
1000654829.korean: - 다친 혀를 치료하고, 리제를 함장실로 데려왔다.

1000654830.english: - With weak footsteps, Lise followed me in and huddled in the corner of the room.
1000654830.korean: - 힘없는 발걸음으로 나를 따라 들어온 리제는 방 구석에 웅크리고 앉았다.

1000654832.english: - I called out to Lise again, who turned her back when I approached.
1000654832.korean: - 내가 다가가자 등을 돌려버리는 리제를 재차 불렀다.

1000654833.english: ...It's not your fault, Master. Because I'm... strange.

1000654834.english: - I sat crouched down, a distance away that would allow one person to sit between me and Lise.
1000654834.korean: - 웅크린 리제와 사람 한 명이 앉을 수 있을 만한 거리를 두고 앉았다.

1000654835.english: I want to eliminate all the pests that are bothering my master's eyes, but...
1000654835.korean: 주인님의 눈을 어지럽히는 해충들을 전부 없애고 싶으면서도…

1000654836.english: While I want to be loved by my master with all my being, I...
1000654836.korean: 주인님에게 몸이 부서져라 사랑받고 싶으면서도, 저는…

1000654841.english: - Even Lise, who finds it difficult to kiss on the forehead or back of the hand instead of the lips...
1000654841.korean: - 입술이 아닌 이마나 손등에 키스를 하는 것도 어려운 리제니까…

1000654843.english: - Lise stared silently at the pinky finger I held out.
1000654843.korean: - 리제는 내가 내민 새끼손가락을 가만히 바라보았다.

1000654845.english: - A moment later, Lise's slightly trembling pinky finger touched mine, forming a hook.
1000654845.korean: - 잠시 후 살짝 떨리는 리제의 새끼 손가락이 내 손가락에 닿고, 고리를 만들었다.

1000654847.english: - Lise stared at their touching fingertips for a while, as if trying to remember the sensation.
1000654847.korean: - 리제는 맞닿은 손가락의 감촉을 기억하려는 듯, 한동안 가만히 그것을 바라보고 있었다.

1000654850.english: What are you fiddling with so much? Give it to me.

1000654852.english: We recognize this individual as a member of the Orca Resistance. Commander-in-Chief of the Resistance Army. Wow, what's this?
1000654852.korean: 해당 인물을 오르카 저항군의 일원으로 인정합니다. 저항군 총사령관. 이야, 이거 뭐야?

1000654853.english: ...I won't beat around the bush. Give it back.

1000654854.english: Oh, you got it from that commander guy?

1000654856.english: Oh, okay, I'll give it to you, I'll give it to you. You even know how to give a warning before dropping a bomb, our little boot has grown up a lot!
1000654856.korean: 아~ 알았어, 줄게줄게. 폭탄 날리기 전에 경고도 할 줄 알고 우리 장화 많이 컸네~

1000654858.english: But since you received things like this, why are you being so pathetic here?
1000654858.korean: 그런데 이런 것도 받았으면서 왜 여기서 궁상떨고 있어?

1000654860.english: What's wrong? Don't you know what it is again? Want me to tell you what this older sister is all about?
1000654860.korean: 왜, 또 뭔지 모르겠어? 이 언니가 뭔지 알려줄까?

1000654862.english: That's because... It's called a sense of belonging, you idiot.

1000654864.english: Well, we were part of the Empress Hound, but it was just in name, wasn't it? If you get caught, you'll be disqualified, so there's no sense of belonging or anything.
1000654864.korean: 우린 뭐, 엠프레시스 하운드 소속이긴 하지만 말 그대로 명목상이었잖아? 발각되면 부정당하는데 소속감이고 뭐고 없지.

1000654865.english: But~ for a teenage girl whose heart was wavering~ when the perfect prince suddenly appeared and said, 'This is where you belong,' how could she not fall head over heels?
1000654865.korean: 그런데~ 마음이 흔들리던 사춘기 소녀한테~ 딱, 왕자님이 나타나서 ‘여기가 네가 있을 곳이야’하고 말해주는데 안 뻑가고 배기나~

1000654869.english: What difference does it make if I explain it to you?

1000654870.english: Of course it's different, you idiot. Do you know how comforting it is to have someone who will listen to you?
1000654870.korean: 당연히 달라지지 븅신아. 자기 말을 들어줄 존재가 있다는 게 얼마나 마음이 놓이는지 알아?

1000654871.english: This older sister also used to vent to our Baek-ah when she was going thru a lot of inner turmoil.
1000654871.korean: 이 언니도 한창 내적갈등을 겪을 땐 우리 백아한테 넋두리를 늘어놨었다고.

1000654872.english: Oh, that snake? I thought it looked unfamiliar.
1000654872.korean: 아, 그 뱀? 어째 못 보던 거다 했다.

1000654875.english: Tsk, what a terrible eye for things.

1000654876.english: Hey, but you don't have to run away, right?
1000654876.korean: 야, 너 근데 안 도망가도 돼?

1000654878.english: Wow... this kid is really not normal.

1000654879.english: If you're not going to run away, that's fine. I'm off.
1000654879.korean: 도망 안 갈거면 됐어. 난 이만.

1000654885.english: - JangHwa, who answered curtly, sat on a tree stump a little distance away.
1000654885.korean: - 퉁명스럽게 대답하는 장화와 약간 떨어진 나무 그루터기에 걸터앉았다.

1000654889.english: You guys, aren't you a little too relaxed?
1000654889.korean: 너희, 너무 긴장감이 없는 거 아냐?

1000654890.english: - I gave JangHwa, who still had a sullen expression, a big smile.
1000654890.korean: - 여전히 뚱한 얼굴을 하고 있는 장화에게 씩 웃어주었다.

1000654894.english: - I stood up and tried to turn around, but my sleeve was grabbed.

1000654897.english: - JangHwa presented the identification card I had given her earlier.
1000654897.korean: - 장화는 이전에 내가 건네준 인식증을 내밀었다.

1000654900.english: - JangHwa blinked as if surprised by the words she had spoken.
1000654900.korean: - 장화는 스스로 내뱉은 말에 놀란듯 눈을 깜박였다.

1000654902.english: - This time, I finally said goodbye and turned away.

1000654903.english: - How long had I been walking? When I looked back, JangHwa were still standing there.
1000654903.korean: - 얼마나 걸었을까, 뒤를 돌아보자 장화는 여전히 그 자리에 서있었다.

1000654905.english: - JangHwa looked as if they were smiling, holding the recognition certificate against their cheek.
1000654905.korean: - 장화는, 인식증을 볼에 대고 웃고 있는 것처럼 보였다.

1000654906.english: - While walking back thru the snow-covered field, Poi, who had been walking beside me for close protection, stopped.
1000654906.korean: - 설원을 걸어 돌아오는 도중, 밀착 경호를 위해 곁에서 걷던 포이가 걸음을 멈췄다.

1000654907.english: Nyaha, that's because... the thieving cat... no, should I say the thieving snake?
1000654907.korean: 냐하핫, 그게요~ 도둑 고양이… 아니, 도둑 뱀이라고 해야 하나~?

1000654908.english: Anyway, there's a fearless guy following us, so~
1000654908.korean: 어쨌든 겁 없는 녀석이 저희를 따라오고 있어서요~

1000654909.english: - Let's look where Poi is pointing, and we can see someone waving from far away.
1000654909.korean: - 포이가 가리키는 곳을 보자, 저 멀리서 손을 흔드는 누군가의 모습이 보였다.

1000654910.english: The guards are all in their positions, but... nyahaha, should Poi take care of them~?
1000654910.korean: 호위대도 다 정위치에 있기는 한데… 냐하핫, 포이가 해치워 버릴까요~?

1000654912.english: Is that a thief snake over there? The master is looking for you, come quickly~
1000654912.korean: 거기 도둑 뱀~? 주인님이 찾으니까 빨리 와봐~

1000654915.english: - Sticking out her tongue and smiling, CheonA strode toward me.
1000654915.korean: - 혀를 내밀고 웃어보인 천아는 성큼성큼 내 앞으로 다가왔다.

1000654916.english: That's far enough! If you come any closer, Poi will tear you to pieces.
1000654916.korean: 거기까지~ 더 가까이 오면 포이가 널 여러 조각으로 만들어 버릴거야.

1000654917.english: You're being really strict. I'll just take a look. It's not going to wear out, is it?
1000654917.korean: 디게 깐깐하게 구네. 좀 보기만 할게. 닳는 것도 아니잖아?

1000654918.english: - After examining me from head to toe for a while, CheonA giggled.
1000654918.korean: - 한동안 나를 구석구석 살펴보던 천아가 배시시 웃었다.

1000654921.english: - He sighed, stopping Poi, who was smiling brightly but had his tail held stiffly and was entering a fighting stance.
1000654921.korean: - 환하게 웃고 있지만 꼬리를 빳빳하게 세우며 전투 태세로 들어가는 포이를 제지하고 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000654922.english: - For now... I don't plan to be openly hostile.

1000654923.english: - To ensure my will was clearly conveyed, I looked into CheonA's eyes and spoke with emphasis.
1000654923.korean: - 의지가 똑똑히 전해지도록, 천아의 눈을 바라보며 힘주어 말했다.

1000654925.english: Ahahaha, what are you saying? You're really funny.

1000654926.english: Why would I harm you? Like this...!
1000654926.korean: 내가 너한테 왜 해를 끼치냐? 이렇… 게!

1000654927.english: It's so warm! Oh, my thoughts were right after all. You're really warm.
1000654927.korean: 이렇게나 따뜻한데~ 아, 역시 내 생각이 맞았어. 디게 따뜻하다, 너.

1000654928.english: - The face of CheonA, nestled in my arms and rubbing her cheek against me, looked so happy.
1000654928.korean: - 내 품에 안겨서 볼을 비비는 천아의 얼굴은 너무나도 행복해 보였다.

1000654929.english: Oh, now that you're here, I don't need a hand warmer anymore. Right, a hand warmer?
1000654929.korean: 아, 너 있으니까 이제 핫팩 필요 없겠다. 그치, 핫팩?

1000654930.english: - I'm called by various titles by the team members, but I never thought I'd be called a hand warmer...
1000654930.korean: - 나는 대원들에게 다양한 호칭으로 불리지만, 하다하다 핫팩이라고 불릴줄은…

1000654931.english: - Whether he knows or doesn't know that Poi next to him is seriously considering whether or not to chop him up for disobeying his orders...
1000654931.korean: - 옆에서 포이가 내 지시를 어기고 본인을 토막낼까 말까 진지한 고민을 하고 있다는 것을 아는지 모르는지...

1000654932.english: - CheonA was happily enjoying my body heat for a while.
1000654932.korean: - 천아는 한동안 행복하게 내 체온을 만끽하고 있었다.

1000654934.english: Ah, I can breathe a little easier now.

1000654935.english: You'll know my name. Then please take care of me from now on, Hot. Pack♥
1000654935.korean: 내 이름은 알거고. 그럼 앞으로도 잘 부탁해, 핫. 팩♥

1000654936.english: Weren't you going to give this to me?

1000654937.english: - In CheonA's hand was another identification card that he had kept in his pocket.
1000654937.korean: - 천아의 손에는 안주머니에 넣어뒀던 또다른 인식증이 들려 있었다.

1000654938.english: Well... when you want to join a group, isn't it easier for everyone if you first prove your worth?
1000654938.korean: 그야… 어떤 집단에 들어가려면, 먼저 본인의 가치를 증명하는 편이 서로 편하잖아?

1000654939.english: - The serious atmosphere that had suddenly fallen over CheonA returned to a grin as she placed the identification card in my pocket.
1000654939.korean: - 순간 진지한 분위기가 되었던 천아는 다시 씨익 웃으며 내 안주머니에 인식증을 넣어 주었다.

1000654941.english: Please give it to me. Ehehe♥

1000654942.english: - Seeing CheonA smiling brightly and holding her hands together in front of her face, I resisted the urge to facepalm.
1000654942.korean: - 활짝 웃으며 얼굴 앞에 양 손을 모아 내미는 천아를 보며 이마를 짚고 싶은 것을 참았다.

1000654943.english: Uh, was this not enough? Then, should I show you a fight, at least? Is that a black cat hissing back there?
1000654943.korean: 에에, 이걸로 부족했어? 그럼 싸우는 거라도 보여줘? 저기 뒤에서… 하악질하는 까만 고양이라던가?

1000654945.english: ...You have to keep your promise, Master.

1000654946.english: Seeing Poi grumble and then return behind him, CheonA feigned surprise.
1000654946.korean: - 볼멘소리를 하고 다시 내 뒤로 돌아가는 포이를 보며 천아는 짐짓 놀란 표정을 지었다.

1000654948.english: No way, 'Poi' is listening? That 'Poi'? Who are you, really?
1000654948.korean: 아니, ‘포이’가 말을 듣는다고? 그 ‘포이’가? 너 정체가 뭐야?

1000654949.english: Of course I know. I was in the middle of something.

1000654950.english: - CheonA said casually and burrowed back into my arms.
1000654950.korean: - 천아는 대수롭지 않게 말하며 다시 내 품속으로 파고들었다.

1000654952.english: Hmm, quite a wall, aren't you? Then...

1000654953.english: - With her body still, CheonA clasped her hands neatly at her navel and bowed her head.
1000654953.korean: - 몸을 뗀 천아는 손을 가지런히 배꼽에 모으고 꾸벅 고개를 숙였다.

1000654954.english: I am CheonA, from the Empress Hound. JangHwa and I are... well, we're at the point where it wouldn't be awkward if we just ate a meal together, just the two of us.
1000654954.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드 소속, 천아입니다. 장화랑은… 음, 그냥 대충 단 둘이 밥 먹어도 어색하진 않은 정도 사이구요.

1000654955.english: I'm 164 centimeters tall and my weight fluctuates around 46 kilograms.

1000654956.english: My specialty is assassination... but due to the nature of my organization, I'm also quite skilled at various other things.
1000654956.korean: 특기는 암살… 이긴한데, 소속 특성상 이것저것 다른 것도 꽤 할 줄 알아요.

1000654957.english: My preferred way of making love is slowly and for a long time, like six hours, holding each other tightly without letting go, and just going on and on...
1000654957.korean: 잠자리 취향은 천천히 오랫동안, 한 여섯 시간 동안 꼭 안은 채로 떨어지지 않고 계속 하는 거긴 하지만...

1000654958.english: For personal reasons, I'm not planning to give my permission before the wedding, so please keep that in mind. Also-
1000654958.korean: 지금은 일신상의 사정으로 인해 결혼하기 전에는 허락할 생각 없으니까 참고해 주시구요. 또-

1000654960.english: Oh, but I don't have any experience, so don't misunderstand, okay? If you're going to do it later, I'd like it if you could do it like this~ hey.
1000654960.korean: 아, 근데 나 경험은 없으니까 오해하면 안 된다? 그냥 나중에 한다면 이렇게 해줬으면 좋겠다~ 야.

1000654961.english: - CheonA was a target for intensive monitoring from the moment he boarded the transport ship with JangHwa.
1000654961.korean: - 천아는 장화와 함께 수송선을 타고 올 때부터 집중 모니터링 대상이었다.

1000654962.english: - And even tho I was already classified as a recruited member at that time, I still felt like I had lost...
1000654962.korean: - 그리고 그때 이미 포섭 인원으로 분류가 됐었지만, 왠지 진 것 같은 기분이…

1000654963.english: ...Hmm, this is what it feels like.

1000654964.english: Belonging somewhere. I bragged and boasted to JangHwa, but... this is my first time too.
1000654964.korean: 어딘가에 소속된다는게. 장화한테는 잘난 척하면서 떠벌려 놨지만… 나도 이런 건 처음이니까.

1000654965.english: - Just like a moment ago, CheonA's voice became serious.

1000654966.english: - It might just be my imagination, but I felt sadness in CheonA's eyes as he gazed blankly at the dementia.
1000654966.korean: - 내 착각일지도 모르지만, 인식증을 물끄러미 내려다보는 천아의 눈동자에서 슬픔이 느껴졌다.

1000654967.english: Yeah. You're the first person to do this to me, hot pack. Aww, I'm completely smitten!
1000654967.korean: 응. 나한테 이런 짓을 한 건, 핫팩 네가 처음이야. 꺄아, 완전히 반해버렸어~

1000654968.english: - CheonA smiled brightly, as if to brush it off, and hugged me again.
1000654968.korean: - 천아는 얼버무리듯이 환하게 웃으며 다시 내 품에 안겼다.

1000654970.english: I'll definitely tell you my measurements.

1000654972.english: Okay, let's go then. Unlike JangHwa, who's being stingy, I hate the cold and want to go inside quickly.
1000654972.korean: 자, 그럼 가자. 궁상 떠는 장화랑 다르게, 난 추운 건 질색이라 빨리 들어가고 싶거든~

1000654974.english: - Not long after Poi and CheonA, who were bickering, returned to the Orca with the others, a red-haired android knocked on the captain's cabin door.
1000654974.korean: - 티격태격하는 포이, 천아와 함께 오르카 호로 돌아온지 얼마 지나지 않아서, 붉은 머리카락의 바이오로이드가 함장실 문을 두드렸다.

1000654975.english: - Including JangHwa, who entered the captain's office hesitantly, two androids from the Empyrean Hound joined the resistance today.
1000654975.korean: - 그렇게 쭈뼛거리며 함장실로 들어온 장화까지, 엠프리시스 하운드 소속의 두 바이오로이드가 오늘 저항군에 합류했다.

1000654977.english: - The captain's office, as usual... no, even more so than usual, filled with a deep sense of motherhood. I am facing six crew members.
1000654977.korean: - 여느때와 같은… 아니, 여느때보다도 모성의 농도가 짙은 함장실. 나는 여섯 명의 대원들을 마주하고 있다.

1000654978.english: If the commander trusts us with their care, we'll take turns looking after them.
1000654978.korean: 사령관님이 저희한테 몸을 맡겨주시면~ 저희가 돌아가면서 돌봐드리는거예요~

1000654979.english: An anecdote is just an anecdote. None of us agreed to dismember the Emperor.
1000654979.korean: 일화는 일화일뿐. 저희 중 그 누구도 폐하를 6등분하는 데에는 동의하지 않았습니다.

1000654980.english: But they said it wouldn't be fair for us to compete against each other...
1000654980.korean: 그렇다고 저희끼리 겨루는 것은 공평하지 않다고 하셔서…

1000654981.english: I'm sorry, it's because of me...

1000654982.english: The more important the matter, the more fairly it should be handled.
1000654982.korean: 이런 중요한 일일수록 공명정대하게 처리해야 하죠.

1000654984.english: But that doesn't mean I can give up taking care of my master.
1000654984.korean: 그렇다고 주인님을 돌봐드리는 것을 포기할 수는 없으니까요.

1000654985.english: And giving you a big hug too...

1000654986.english: Master... starting today, please fall into eternal sleep with me...
1000654986.korean: 주인님… 오늘부터 저와 함께 영원한 잠에 빠져주세요…

1000654987.english: - To avoid agitating the crew, I slowly, very slowly, got up from my seat.
1000654987.korean: - 대원들을 자극하지 않기 위해 천천히, 아주 천천히 자리에서 일어났다.

1000654988.english: - It still seems to be just smiling, but I can feel a slight movement. ...Yes, to stop me.
1000654988.korean: - 여전히 웃고만 잇는 것 같지만, 약간의 움직임이 느껴진다. …그래, 나를 저지하기 위한.

1000654989.english: - Silence. As if that was enough of an answer, the crew members slowly begin to approach. gulp. I swallowed involuntarily.
1000654989.korean: - 침묵. 그것으로 대답은 충분하다는 듯 대원들은 천천히 다가오기 시작한다. 꿀꺽. 나도 모르게 침을 삼켰다.

1000654990.english: - Of course, just as humans have varying physical abilities, there are differences among the crew members as well.
1000654990.korean: - 당연하지만, 인간들의 신체 능력이 가지각색인 것처럼 대원들 간에도 차이가 있다.

1000654991.english: - While there are exceptions, the physical abilities of the members who were civilians or soldiers were relatively lower compared to those who were captains or high-end models.
1000654991.korean: - 예외가 있기는 하지만 민수용, 혹은 병사였던 대원들의 신체 능력은 대장급, 혹은 고급 모델이었던 대원들에 비해 상대적으로 떨어지는 식.

1000654992.english: - Whether it's thanks to that or just in general, I tend to be relaxed even when spending time with many crew members. If we're just talking about physical ability, there aren't that many people who can compare to me. But...
1000654992.korean: - 그 덕분이라고 해야할지, 일반적으로 나는 여러 대원들과 함께 시간을 보내도 여유가 있는 편이다. 신체 능력만 따지자면 나와 견줄 상대가 그렇게 많지 않으니까. 하지만...

1000654993.english: - Unfortunately, except for Maria, all the 'mamans' in front of me right now possess powerful physical abilities.
1000654993.korean: - 불행하게도 마리아를 제외하면 지금 내 눈 앞의 ‘마망’들은 하나같이 강력한 신체 능력의 소유자.

1000654994.english: - No, there's even a possibility that Maria could demonstrate abilities that exceed my expectations. Because mothers are great.
1000654994.korean: - 아니, 심지어 마리아가 내 예상을 뛰어넘는 능력을 발휘할 가능성조차 존재한다. 어머니는 위대한 법이니까.

1000654997.english: - The members who have almost surrounded me are getting closer, but I calmly accelerate my thinking.
1000654997.korean: - 나를 반포위한 대원들이 점점 다가오고 있지만, 침착하게 사고를 가속한다.

1000654999.english: - In this accelerated thought process, the time given to me is infinite...!
1000654999.korean: - 가속된 사고 속에서, 내게 주어진 시간은 무한대…!

1000655001.english: - Didn't they say humans display incredible strength in times of crisis?
1000655001.korean: - 인간은 위기 상황에서 엄청난 힘을 발휘한다고 했던가.

1000655002.english: - Faced with the crisis, my mind, spinning at full speed, has succeeded in creating a phenomenon similar to stopping time, but only for me.
1000655002.korean: - 위기를 맞아 팽팽 돌아가는 나의 두뇌는, 나에 한정해 시간을 멈추는 것과 유사한 현상을 발생시키는 것에 성공했다.

1000655003.english: - Then, all that's left now is to analyze the opponent's and my own strength, supplement our weaknesses, and strengthen our strengths to break thru.
1000655003.korean: - 그렇다면 이제 남은 일은 상대와 나의 전력을 분석, 약점을 보완하고 강점을 강화해 돌파하는 일 뿐.

1000655004.english: - There's a common perception that all-rounder characters are weak, but that's only true if their overall stats are low.
1000655004.korean: - 흔히 올라운더 캐릭터는 약체라는 인식이 있지만, 그것은 전반적인 능력치가 낮을 경우에나 그렇다.

1000655005.english: - Because if all stats are above a certain level, an all-rounder character is truly versatile.
1000655005.korean: - 모든 능력치가 일정 수준 이상일 경우, 올라운더 캐릭터는 그야말로 만능이니까

1000655006.english: - Then Cerestia is the most suitable for being the most versatile. Every aspect of her appearance, behavior, and personality is truly the embodiment of motherhood.
1000655006.korean: - 그렇다면 세레스티아야말로 가장 만능에 걸맞다고 할 수 있다. 외모, 행동, 성격 하나하나 그야말로 모성의 화신.

1000655007.english: - Among those, the thing you should be especially careful of is that gentle touch, right? If I let my body give in even a little, I'm sure I'll lose my will to resist completely.
1000655007.korean: - 그중에서도 특히 주의해야할 점은 저 나긋나긋한 손길이겠지. 조금이라도 몸을 허락한다면, 나는 그대로 저항 의지를 상실할 것이 뻔하다.

1000655008.english: - Among the proverbs of the world before the destruction, there is one like this. Women are weak, but mothers are strong. It's truly a proverb made for Maria.
1000655008.korean: - 멸망 전 세상의 속담 중에 이런 것이 있다. ‘여자는 약하지만, 어머니는 강하다.’ 그야말로 마리아를 위한 속담이 아닐 수 없다.

1000655009.english: - Although she may lack the strength and stamina of other 'mamans', I know very well that her love for her child is second to none.
1000655009.korean: - 비록 다른 ‘마망’들 보다 힘과 체력은 모자랄지라도, 아이를 생각하는 마음만큼은 누구에게도 지지 않는다는 것을 나는 너무나 잘 알고 있다.

1000655010.english: - That's why, if our eyes meet, those slightly drooping, moist eyes, my resistance will melt away.
1000655010.korean: - 그렇기에 저 살짝 처진, 촉촉한 눈망울과 시선이 마주친다면 내 저항 의지는 녹아내려 버리고 말겠지.

1000655011.english: - If Cerestia is an all-rounder, Sekhmet can be said to have S-rank in all stats except for one.
1000655011.korean: - 세레스티아가 올라운더라면, 세크메트는 한 가지의 능력치를 제외하면 모두 S급이라고 할 수 있다.

1000655013.english: - Sekhmet is still clumsy. Because they are clumsy, their heart leads them, which quickly manifests as a radical and rigid attitude.
1000655013.korean: - 세크메트는 아직 서투르다. 서투르기 때문에 마음이 앞서게 되고, 이는 곧 과격하고 강경한 태도로 나타난다.

1000655014.english: - If I'm caught, I'll surely end up living a life where I entrust everything to Sekhmet.
1000655014.korean: - 붙잡힌다면, 분명 나는 모든 것을 세크메트에게 맡기는 삶을 살게 될 터.

1000655015.english: - Marie, the master strategist, and Frigga, who specializes in one-on-one combat, complement each other's weaknesses, pushing me into a corner.
1000655015.korean: - 전략의 달인인 마리와 대인전에 특화된 프리가가 서로의 빈틈을 보완하며 나를 궁지로 몰아넣는다.

1000655016.english: - If Maria is a formidable opponent in terms of emotion, these two are completely the opposite. It can literally be called irresistible motherhood.
1000655016.korean: - 마리아가 감성적인 부분으로 강적이라면, 이 둘은 완전히 정 반대. 말 그대로 항거불능의 모성이라고 할 수 있다.

1000655017.english: - And above all... my physical abilities and excellent combat sense, which are not inferior to his, diminish my will to resist even before I attempt to escape.
1000655017.korean: - 그리고 무엇보다도… 내게도 별로 밀리지 않는 신체 능력과 탁월한 전투 센스는, 탈출을 시도하기도 전에 내 저항 의지를 깎아내린다.

1000655018.english: - And finally... One member whose actions are completely unpredictable. His seemingly blank face gives no clue as to what he might be thinking right now.
1000655018.korean: - 그리고 마지막으로... 도저히 예상이 가지 않는 대원이 한 명. 일견 멍해보이는 얼굴은, 지금 대체 무슨 생각을 하고 있는지조차 짐작이 가지 않는다.

1000655019.english: - The fortunate thing is that Eternity is obedient to me. I could make them allies with just a word...
1000655019.korean: - 다행인 것은 이터니티는 내게 순종적이라는 점. 부탁 한 마디면 바로 아군으로 만들 수 있겠지만...

1000655020.english: - Even so, the situation wouldn't change much, would it? No, they might even demand to be buried with you in the coffin as payment for the favor.
1000655020.korean: - 그렇다 할지라도 상황은 크게 바뀌지 않겠지. 아니, 그 부탁의 대가로 관에 함께 들어가 묻히는 것을 요구할지도 모른다.

1000655021.english: - One second has passed. I realized I was sweating profusely. Now, 'Maman'...
1000655021.korean: - 1초가 흘렀다. 땀이 비오듯 쏟아지고 있다는 것을 깨달았다. 이제 ‘마망’...

1000655022.english: - Oh, no. The team members are right in front of me. I can feel deep affection and maternal love.
1000655022.korean: - 아, 아니. 대원들은 바로 내 코앞에 있다. 깊은 애정과 모성이 느껴져온다.

1000655023.english: - It was close, but we've finished analyzing our opponent's strength. Now, what I should do is...!
1000655023.korean: - 아슬아슬했지만, 상대의 전력 분석은 모두 끝났다. 이제 내가 취해야할 행동은…!

1000655024.english: No matter how hard I rack my brains, I can't see any way out. ...No, why should we even be getting out in the first place...?
1000655024.korean: - 아무리 머리를 굴려도 도저히 빠져나갈 구멍이 보이지 않는다. …아니, 애초에 왜 빠져나가야 하는거지…?

1000655025.english: - The resistance I feel melts away like snow on a spring day, in the face of the deep and genuine affection the crew members have for me.
1000655025.korean: - 대원들에게서 느껴지는, 나를 향한 깊고 진실한 애정에 저항 의지가 봄날 눈 녹듯 사그라진다.

1000655026.english: - And the spoiled brat hiding deep within my heart surfaces.
1000655026.korean: - 그리고 내 마음 속 깊은 곳에 숨어있던 응석쟁이가 수면 위로 올라온다.

1000655028.english: - After confirming that I had lost the will to resist, Cerestia approached me with gentle steps and embraced me.
1000655028.korean: - 내가 저항 의지를 상실한 것을 확인하고 나긋나긋한 걸음으로 다가온 세레스티아가 나를 품에 안았다.

1000655029.english: Let's have them placed in the coffin first.

1000655031.english: - Frigga picked me up and gently laid me in the coffin. Gradually... my mind is getting hazy.
1000655031.korean: - 프리가가 나를 번쩍 안아들어 관에 눕혔다. 점점… 정신이 흐려진다.

1000655032.english: Okay, please wait a moment. Only I can handle your Majesty's tantrums. I'll take the initiative.
1000655032.korean: 자, 잠깐 기다리세요. 폐하의 응석을 감당할 수 있는 것은 오직 저뿐. 제가 먼저 나서겠습니다.

1000655034.english: I will wait until the time is ripe.

1000655036.english: - All the worries of the world are disappearing. It's as if I've entered the womb, with soft, warm things embracing my entire body.
1000655036.korean: - 세상만사 모든 고민거리들이 사라져간다. 마치 태내에 들어온 것처럼, 부드럽고 따스한 것들이 온몸을 품어주고 있다.

1000655037.english: - Recently, the posts I saw on the community site before the apocalypse are starting to make sense. Just by being spoiled, it can be this comfortable...
1000655037.korean: - 얼마 전, 멸망 전의 커뮤니티 사이트에서 보았던 글들이 이해되기 시작한다. 응석을 부리는 것 만으로, 이렇게나 편해지는구나…

1000655039.english: Your Majesty, this mother can bring you the greatest joy.
1000655039.korean: 폐하, 이 어미가 폐하를 가장 기쁘게 해드릴 수 있습니다.

1000655040.english: My master is lying as if dead... I can't believe I'm seeing this in my lifetime...
1000655040.korean: 죽은듯이 누워계시는 주인님… 이런 모습을 살아서 볼 수 있다니…

1000655041.english: Are you perhaps hungry? Fortunately, I have some easily digestible milk I can offer you...
1000655041.korean: 혹시 배가 고프시진 않을까요? 마침 소화 잘되는 우유를 드릴 수 있는데…

1000655042.english: Haha, I really want to give you a big hug.

1000655044.english: - My consciousness is fading. No matter what anyone says, right now, at this very moment, I must be the happiest person in the world.
1000655044.korean: - 점점 의식이 가라앉아간다. 누가 뭐라해도, 지금 이순간 세상에서 가장 행복한 사람은 바로 나겠지.

1000655048.english: - Jogging. An act that has been passed down since our distant human ancestors first stood on two feet on the earth.
1000655048.korean: - 뜀박질. 인간의 멀고 먼 선조가 첫 번째로 대지에 두 발을 딛고 섰을 때부터 이어져 내려온 행위.

1000655049.english: - This extremely simple and instinctive act is one where most performance is determined by physical ability. Then, I also have a chance of winning...!
1000655049.korean: - 이 몹시 단순하고 본능적인 행위는, 대부분의 퍼포먼스가 신체 능력으로 결정된다. 그렇다면, 내게도 승산이 있다…!

1000655050.english: - The opening Maria, unfamiliar with tactical movements, momentarily showed. In the split second after 0.5 seconds, when Marie will block, I boldly exploit that opening!
1000655050.korean: - 전술적인 움직임에 익숙하지 않은 마리아가 일순간 보인 빈틈. 0.5초 후면 마리가 막아설 그 찰나의 빈틈을, 과감하게 파고든다!

1000655051.english: - I became the wind itself and ran out into the hallway without looking back.
1000655051.korean: - 나는 그대로 바람이 되어, 뒤도 돌아보지 않고 복도로 달려나갔다.

1000655053.english: ...A perfect and bold decision. You are indeed the President. You've been hit hard.
1000655053.korean: …완벽하고 과감한 결단. 역시 각하십니다. 한 방 먹었군요.

1000655054.english: If you run away like this... there's no way we can chase you...
1000655054.korean: 이렇게 도망가버리시면… 저희로선 도저히 쫓아갈 수가 없네요…

1000655055.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry. Because of me...

1000655056.english: No. Because it was something I should have kept. It's my fault.
1000655056.korean: 아닙니다. 응당 제가 지켰어야 하는 일이니까요. 제 잘못입니다.

1000655057.english: Oh my goodness... you seem to be faster than usual today!
1000655057.korean: 어머나… 오늘은 평소보다 빠르신 것 같네요~

1000655058.english: That nuance is disrespectful to Your Majesty, please withdraw it immediately.
1000655058.korean: 그 늬앙스, 폐하께 누가되니 당장 철회하세요.

1000655060.english: We should have put the master in the coffin sooner...

1000655062.english: - Running and running, I finally arrived at the warehouse.

1000655063.english: - Objectively speaking, I didn't push myself too hard, but my extremely active brain and tense muscles are demanding rest.
1000655063.korean: - 객관적으로 봤을 때 그렇게 무리하지는 않았지만, 극도로 활성화됐었던 두뇌와 팽팽히 긴장한 근육이 휴식을 요구하고 있다.

1000655064.english: - I collapsed in the corner of the warehouse, gasping for breath.
1000655064.korean: - 창고 구석에 무너지듯 쓰러져 숨을 골랐다.

1000655066.english: Commander? What are you doing here?

1000655067.english: I'm sweating... Just a moment. I'll get the towel and water.

1000655069.english: - Only after wiping the sweat with the towel Andvari had brought and drinking an entire bottle of mineral water was I finally able to regain a little bit of peace of mind and body.
1000655069.korean: - 안드바리가 가져온 수건으로 땀을 닦고, 생수 한 병을 전부 마시고 나서야 간신히 심신의 안정을 조금이나마 되찾을 수 있었다.

1000655071.english: I thought it was obviously LRL and Alvis when someone suddenly ran in.
1000655071.korean: 저는 누가 갑자기 뛰어들어오길래, 당연히 LRL이랑 알비스인줄 알았거든요.

1000655073.english: ...Oh! Commander, shall I be your pillow?

1000655074.english: Yes. There's nothing to see here, and the warehouse floor is cold too. I'll also lay out a towel for you.
1000655074.korean: 네. 여기 벨 것도 없고, 창고 바닥도 차잖아요. 수건도 깔아드릴게요.

1000655075.english: - What is this feeling? A moment ago, what I felt from the team members is starting to be felt again.
1000655075.korean: - 뭐지, 이 기분은. 조금 전, 대원들에게서 느껴졌던 것이 다시 느껴지기 시작한다.

1000655077.english: - Shaking off a slight hesitation, I lay down with Andvari's knee as a pillow.
1000655077.korean: - 약간의 망설임을 털어버리고, 안드바리의 무릎을 베고 누웠다.

1000655081.english: - Although Andvari himself didn't realize it, I, who had run away from motherhood, met another mother...
1000655081.korean: - 정작 안드바리는 깨닫지 못했지만, 모성에게서 도망친 나는 또다른 모성을 만났고…

1000655082.english: - I was able to have a happy time in my own way.
1000655082.korean: - 나름대로, 행복한 시간을 보낼 수 있었다.

1000655084.english: - The brutal and cold world of competition. There, I was the 'best'.
1000655084.korean: - 잔혹하고 냉정한 승부의 세계. 그곳에서 난, ‘최고’였다.

1000655087.english: Why did I get self-countered? I thought you were a total pro because you were using a barcode scanner;
1000655087.korean: 아니 왜 셀프 카운터 당함? 바코드 쓰길래 쌉고수인줄 알았네;

1000655088.english: What outdated build are you using?

1000655090.english: - I closed the results window, which was filled with embarrassing chat messages, and pulled my hair out.
1000655090.korean: - 낯부끄러워지는 채팅이 올라오는 결과창을 닫아버리고 머리를 쥐어뜯었다.

1000655091.english: - Currently, the game 'Steel Line Online' is vying for the top two spots in the Orca crew's hobby activities.
1000655091.korean: - 현재, 오르카 대원들의 취미 활동 지분 1, 2위를 다투는 게임, ‘스틸라인 온라인’.

1000655092.english: - I used to store data for the crew in the Orca's database and run my own server.
1000655092.korean: - 예전에 대원들을 위해 데이터를 오르카 호 데이터 베이스에 저장해두고 자체 서버를 굴리기 시작했었다.

1000655093.english: - And with my excellent situational awareness, map reading, and overwhelming physical prowess, I achieved the number one ranking. There were times when my ranking would drop due to work...
1000655093.korean: - 그리고 나는 탁월한 상황판단과 맵리딩, 압도적인 피지컬로 랭킹 1위를 달성. 업무 때문에 종종 순위가 떨어지는 경우도 있었지만...

1000655095.english: - Of course, all the data from 'Steel Line Online' was also stored in the Ark of Memory.
1000655095.korean: - 기억의 방주에는 당연히, ‘스틸라인 온라인’의 모든 데이터도 보관되어 있었다.

1000655096.english: - This is good news for the members who have been enjoying the same version without updates. A large-scale update was implemented soon after.
1000655096.korean: - 업데이트 없이 똑같은 버전만을 즐기던 대원들에게는 희소식. 곧 대규모 업데이트가 진행되었다.

1000655097.english: - And since I had also become unemployed, I picked up the mouse again after a long time... Soon, I tasted despair.
1000655097.korean: - 그리고 나도 마침 백수가 된 김에 오랜만에 마우스를 잡았고... 곧 절망을 맛보았다.

1000655099.english: - Yumi, who was looking at me pitifully as I screamed, glanced at my battle record.
1000655099.korean: - 괴성을 지르는 나를 안쓰럽게 바라보던 유미가 내 대전 기록을 훑어보았다.

1000655100.english: Your team luck isn't the best, is it?

1000655101.english: Rather than that... Too... meta. Perhaps you haven't been able to adapt...
1000655101.korean: 그것보단... 메타에 너무... 적응을 못하신게 아닐지...

1000655102.english: - Actually, I know that very well too. Before, we won by grabbing the hair of teammates who refused to board and forcing them on.
1000655102.korean: - 사실, 그건 나도 잘 알고 있다. 이전에는 탑승을 거부하는 팀원도 머리채를 잡고 강제로 탑승시켜서 이겼으니까.

1000655103.english: - As I was looking thru the Daejeon records with a heavy heart, Yumi massaged my shoulders.
1000655103.korean: - 착잡한 마음으로 대전 기록을 훑어보는 내 어깨를 유미가 주물러 주었다.

1000655104.english: Can I help you with something?
