1000655105.english: Yes. Even tho I'm not good at games, I'm in charge of server management, so I know everything that's been added and changed.
1000655105.korean: 네. 제가 게임은 잘 못해도, 서버 관리를 맡고 있으니까 뭐가 추가되고 뭐가 바뀌었는지는 다 알거든요.

1000655106.english: And since I'm also confident in data management and analysis, I can provide the optimal pick and build.
1000655106.korean: 그리고 데이터 관리랑 분석도 자신있으니까, 최적의 픽과 템트리를-

1000655111.english: - The enemy's camp. With all the defense towers destroyed, a large team fight broke out during the standoff. Yumi, who was small in stature, was sitting between my legs for the coach.
1000655111.korean: - 적의 진영. 방어 타워는 모두 철거된 상태에서 대치중 커다란 한타가 벌어졌다. 체구가 작은 유미는 코치를 위해 내 다리 사이에 앉아 있었다.

1000655112.english: Main base, attack the main base!

1000655113.english: The item you posted earlier has additional damage, so you can clear it!
1000655113.korean: 아까 올리신 템에 추가피해 있으니까 깰 수 있어요!

1000655114.english: - Use all your physical abilities to dodge the enemy's skill shots and focus fire on their base. And the moment my character falls...
1000655114.korean: - 모든 피지컬을 동원해 적의 스킬샷을 피하며 적의 본진을 점사. 그리고 내 캐릭터가 쓰러지는 순간...

1000655117.english: - 1 win after a 24-game losing streak. I hugged Yumi and reveled in the overwhelming emotion.
1000655117.korean: - 24연패 후 1승. 유미를 끌어안고 북받치는 감동을 만끽했다.

1000655120.english: - The brief emotion fades, and an emptiness fills its place. Score... How do I recover...
1000655120.korean: - 짧았던 감동이 지나가고, 그 자리를 공허함이 채운다. 점수... 어떻게 복구하지...

1000655122.english: Oh, I've been wanting to tell you this since earlier... You're so focused...
1000655122.korean: 아, 아까부터 말씀드리고 싶었는데요... 너무 집중하고 계셔서...

1000655123.english: ...... It keeps... on my back, that... Touching...

1000655125.english: - To change the awkward atmosphere, I decided to change the subject.
1000655125.korean: - 민망한 분위기를 바꾸기 위해 화제를 돌리기로 했다.

1000655127.english: Really? Yes, I will! Then let's go to my room.
1000655127.korean: 진짜요? 네, 할래요! 그럼 제 방으로 가요.

1000655128.english: - Follow Yumi to the room and wash with a new ID - I created a new ID.
1000655128.korean: - 유미를 따라 방으로 가서 새 아이디로 세탁- 새 아이디를 만들었다.

1000655129.english: - ...The 24-game losing streak is something I'll have to bury until the day I die.

1000655130.english: - Excited by the hard-won victory, he made a joke, but instead of being embarrassed, Yumi pouted.
1000655130.korean: - 간신히 따낸 승리에 고양되어 던진 농담에, 유미는 부끄러워하는 것이 아니라 입술을 삐죽였다.

1000655131.english: You're trying to pull another prank, aren't you!

1000655132.english: - Yumi didn't even look back and pressed the start game button again, and a queue was found almost immediately.
1000655132.korean: - 유미는 돌아보지도 않고 다시 게임 시작 버튼을 눌렀고, 금세 큐가 잡혔다.

1000655134.english: - Are you angry...? Carefully choosing a character while watching Yumi's reaction, the game began.
1000655134.korean: - 화난 건가…? 유미의 눈치를 보며 조심조심 캐릭터를 고르고, 게임이 시작됐다.

1000655135.english: - After the loading screen appeared... Yumi spun around and sat facing me.
1000655135.korean: - 로딩 창이 뜨고 난 뒤… 유미는 빙글 몸을 돌려 나를 마주보고 앉았다.

1000655138.english: No, it's not the first time the commander has played a trick. Instead...
1000655138.korean: 아뇨, 사령관님이 장난치시는 거 한 두번도 아닌데요. 대신…

1000655139.english: - Yumi's arms wrapped around his neck, and their bodies pressed close together.
1000655139.korean: - 유미의 양 팔이 목에 감기고, 서로의 몸이 밀착했다.

1000655141.english: - I couldn't bear the bitter taste of defeat again, so I reluctantly picked up the mouse, and Yumi, watching my reaction, slowly started to move.
1000655141.korean: - 또다시 패배의 쓴맛을 볼 수는 없는 나는 어쩔 수 없이 마우스를 잡았고, 유미는 내 반응을 살피며 조금씩 몸을 움직였다.

1000655142.english: Hehe. This is the first time I'm taking the lead... it's a strange feeling...
1000655142.korean: 헤헷. 제가 주도권을 잡는 건 처음이네요… 이상한 기분…

1000655144.english: - I couldn't focus on the game for some reason...
1000655144.korean: - 나는 모종의 이유로 인해 게임에 집중할 수 없었고…

1000655145.english: - In the end, they achieved a remarkable record of 24 consecutive losses, followed by one win, and then 7 consecutive losses.

1000655146.english: - It was as if it had been predetermined, my eyes opened. Even without looking at my watch, I could tell it was 6 in the morning.
1000655146.korean: - 마치 정해져 있던 것처럼 눈이 뜨였다. 굳이 시계를 보지 않아도, 새벽 6시라는 것을 알 수 있었다.

1000655147.english: Habits are truly terrifying. The wake-up time I've had ingrained in me for years remains the same, even now that I'm unemployed.
1000655147.korean: - 습관이란 건 참 무서워서, 몇 년간 몸에 밴 기상시간은 실업자가 되어서도 그대로.

1000655148.english: - But now, I have the courage to ignore that habit.
1000655148.korean: - 하지만 지금의 나에겐, 그 습관을 무시할 용기가 있다.

1000655149.english: - But once the water spirit leaves, it never returns. As I tossed and turned in bed, a voice came from beside me.
1000655149.korean: - 하지만 한 번 떠나버린 수마는 돌아오지 않는다. 내가 몸을 뒤척이자, 옆에서 목소리가 들려왔다.

1000655151.english: - Lying on my side, I buried my face in her light brown hair and held her soft body in my arms.
1000655151.korean: - 옆으로 누워 연갈색 머리카락에 얼굴을 묻고, 부드러운 몸을 품에 안았다.

1000655152.english: - Naturally, my hand ended up near her upper body. I felt mischievous.
1000655152.korean: - 자연히 내 손은 그녀의 상체 언저리에 위치. 장난기가 들었다.

1000655154.english: Half-asleep, she twisted in her body.
1000655154.korean: - 반쯤 잠든 상태로, 그녀가 몸을 비틀었다.

1000655156.english: You've done a lot... Yesterday... Night... Uh...?

1000655157.english: Then... Ji, right now...! Oh no, I overslept...!

1000655158.english: - With a scream, she jumped out of bed. Vera quickly ran into the bathroom to wash, then rushed out and put on the clothes she had neatly folded by the bedside.
1000655158.korean: - 비명과 함께 침대에서 튀어나간 그녀, 베라는 순식간에 화장실로 들어가 씻고 달려나와 침대맡에 곱게 개어놓았던 옷을 챙겨입었다.

1000655160.english: - Vera's gaze followed my finger, which was lying on the bed and pointing at the clock.
1000655160.korean: - 베라의 시선이 침대에 누워 시계를 가리키는 내 손가락을 따라 움직였다.

1000655161.english: - Blinking and checking the date, Vera let out a deep sigh.
1000655161.korean: - 눈을 깜빡이며 날짜를 확인한 베라가 포옥, 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000655162.english: Yes... Oh, I thot something terrible had happened...
1000655162.korean: 네에... 하아, 큰일 난 줄 알았어요...

1000655163.english: - Vera slumped onto the bed and looked down at me.
1000655163.korean: - 침대에 털썩 주저앉은 베라가 나를 내려다 보았다.

1000655167.english: Even so, if you're up, you should at least wash up. Okay.

1000655168.english: - Vera smiled softly and held out her hand.

1000655169.english: Our commander is so kind, isn't he? Come on.

1000655170.english: - My heart melted at that gentle smile, and I...
1000655170.korean: - 그 부드러운 미소에 마음이 녹아내린 난...

1000655171.english: - I decided to turn over and try to go back to sleep.

1000655173.english: Don't talk like Sergeant Efreeti! Ugh...!
1000655173.korean: 이프리트 병장님 같은 말씀하시지 말구요! 끄응...!

1000655174.english: - In the end, I was forcibly lifted up while still in a dazed state.
1000655174.korean: - 결국 난 몽롱한 상태 그대로 강제로 일으켜지고 말았다.

1000655175.english: Haa... Then I'll do it for you. Is this satisfactory?
1000655175.korean: 하아... 그럼 제가 해드릴게요. 이러면 불만 없으시죠?

1000655176.english: - Before I could even answer, Vera dragged me to the bathroom, and in the blink of an eye, she demolished the bird's nest on my head and got me dressed.
1000655176.korean: - 베라는 대답을 듣기도 전에 나를 화장실로 데려간 뒤, 눈 깜빡할 사이에 머리의 새집을 철거하고 옷을 입혔다.

1000655177.english: Okay, look how great it is.

1000655178.english: Right? So, let's start the day again with energy... Eh?!
1000655178.korean: 그렇죠? 그러니까 다시 활기차게 하루를... 에에?!

1000655179.english: - Vera, who was looking at me crawling back into bed, surprisingly had a cool expression.
1000655179.korean: - 다시 침대로 꼬물꼬물 기어들어간 나를 바라보는 베라는 의외로 시원한 표정이었다.

1000655180.english: I won't do it. Actually, since today is a day off, I've decided to be a generous Vera who allows everything, instead of the usual strict and nagging Vera.
1000655180.korean: 안 해요. 사실, 오늘은 쉬는날이니까 평소의 깐깐하고 잔소리많은 베라가 아니라, 모든 걸 다 허락하는 넓은 마음의 베라가 되기로 했어요.

1000655181.english: What did you just say...? Hehe, it's like a habit...
1000655181.korean: 방금 뭐라고 한 건... 헤헷, 습관 같은거라...

1000655183.english: - Vera came into the bed and hugged me.
1000655183.korean: - 베라는 이불 속으로 들어와 나를 껴안았다.

1000655184.english: I'm going to spend the whole day lounging around with the commander.

1000655186.english: ... Ugh. Oh, no. This was only for last night - eek?!
1000655186.korean: ...읏. 아, 안돼요. 이건 어젯밤 한정이었- 꺅?!

1000655187.english: - In the end, we didn't take a single step out of bed until the next morning.
1000655187.korean: - 결국 다음 날 아침까지, 우리는 침대 밖으로 단 한 발자국도 나가지 않았다.

1000655188.english: < Orca Commander-in-Chief (Unemployed) > Continue to the next story.
1000655188.korean: < 오르카 총 사령관 (무직) > 다음 이야기에 계속.

1000655194.english: Like… gradually getting used to it?

1000655196.english: She was fine during the procedure, but ran off the moment it ended.

1000655198.english: Oh, did you just get a good idea?

1000655201.english: This… are we really sure Lise agreed to this…?
1000655201.korean: 이거… 진짜 리제가 동의한 거 맞지…?

1000655202.english: Well… there's no way Aqua could tie Lise up alone…
1000655202.korean: 하긴… 아쿠아 혼자 리제를 묶을 수 있을리가…
